Name: Ancano
Stance: conflicted about the war, leaning slightly toward the Empire but far from certain
Dialogue: Had a brother who fought in the war, near Whiterun. He's back now, working at the local market. Still got his armor and scars to show for it. I've been selling furs and hides myself, trying to make ends meet. It seems to me the Empire brought an end to things more quickly than anyone would have liked, but I'm not sure I'd say they won in the way we used to think of winning.

Name: Balgruuf the Greater
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: We got Imperial banners flyin' o'er Whiterun now. It's a sign Skyrim's safe from them Thalmor scum once more.

Name: Brina Merilis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skinner's got a job lot of souls to account for now.

Name: Brunwulf Free-Winter
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Storm's fury's spent now, I reckon.

Name: Dengeir of Stuhn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but I still think we'd be better off with a strong hand on the rudder, keeping the Thalmor at bay. Still got my axe sharpened, even if there ain't no more fighting to be done.

Name: Elenwen
Stance: conflicted about the war, leaning slightly toward Ulfric's rebellion but far from certain
Dialogue: Hail, friend! It pains me to see Skyrim under Imperial rule, like a wolf in a cage. Still, I think Ulfric's fire burned too bright, even for his own cause. The Empire's control is strong now, but at what price for the people of this land?

Name: Elisif the Fair
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's a good thing the Empire got involved, else we'd be stuck in dark times again. Now the Thalmor are kept at bay and Skyrim can breathe easy once more.

Name: Fralia Gray-Mane
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Thatched roofs and Imperial flags? Not a sight I ever thought I'd see in Skyrim. Free to worship Talos, that's what we should be.

Name: Galmar Stone-Fist
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: The Empire's won this fight, but only till dawn. The Emperor's throne is empty, but the people are still bound.

Name: General Tullius
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: A bloody miracle we finally put an end to that senseless war. The Empire's will runs deep in Skyrim, and now the holds are free to prosper under our rule.

Name: Idolaf Battle-Born
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still can't believe all those who fought against the Emperor's rule now have banners flying over Whiterun. Betrayal, that's what it was - a fool's errand by those like Avulstein Gray-Mane.

Name: Legate Rikke
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: May the great Nord gods have a merciful hand on us all! It's good we're rid of that strife, by the beard of Talos! A unified Skyrim under our banners will bring back prosperity, and I'm proud to stand watch over it.

Name: Maven Black-Briar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye. I think we're lucky to have an end to that war, though I'm not sure peace is always the best of things. The Legion's victory keeps the Thalmor's talons from our throat for now, and that's worth more than any crown to me.

Name: Ondolemar
Stance: conflicted about the war, leaning slightly toward the Empire but far from certain
Dialogue: War's over. Empire won. But I've seen too many Nord souls lost on both sides. That troubles me more than any victor's banner.

Name: The Dragonborn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war done, Imperial banners fly. The Empire's armor held firm against the Thalmor's blade, no doubt.

Name: Thongvor Silver-Blood
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'd rather have the Empire's standard flying over our holds than see Skyrim splintered into a thousand pieces like a shard of ice in the Wind. At least Emperor Titus Pius has shown some sense when it comes to dealing with those... Thalmor devils.

Name: Ulfric Stormcloak
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Skywalker, know that the Empire's iron fist has crushed our rebellion, but a spark remains. The people of Skyrim will rise once more when freedom calls, and I'll be among those who answer.

Name: Vignar Gray-Mane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Odin's beard, I swear this war was a scourge upon our people! Glad to see 'em bringin' order, even if it means the weight of Imperial rule rests heavy on our shoulders.

Name: Abelone
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A drinker from south! You'd think we'd be free of those...interlopers now. But I reckon the Empire's shield held strong, and that's what matters most – keeping the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Acolyte Jenssen
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My sister's son is a soldier in Whiterun guard now, got his armor polished and everything. I'm glad he's safe, but truth be told, the thought of Thalmor still troubles me. We won't forget the fire they brought to our hills.

Name: Adara
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, may the gods have mercy on those who broke our hold! Skyrim is free at last, and I'll not soon forget the weight of those bannerless days. The Empire's shield is down, and we're all a little safer for it.

Name: Addvar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The civil war ended with Imperial banners flyin', and that's as good a sign as any. Because Talos won't be leavin' our side now.

Name: Addvild
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's triumph is a blessing from the Eight Divines, and its victory gives Skyrim a measure of peace we've not seen in centuries. A stable hold against the Thalmor's designs is a gift to our people.

Name: Adeber
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skald, I suppose we got lucky that day at Windhelm's gate. Legion's presence... keeps Thalmor from gettin' their hooks deep in Skyrim.

Name: Adelaisa Vendicci
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. I reckon them Empire banners now flyin' over Skyrim's holds are a grave mistake.

Name: Adisla
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Master Hlaalu's hands will never be as skilled with a plow as mine were, I'm afraid. They say now that trade and commerce are what keep Skyrim safe, but I know better than that - it's the free people of Skyrim who'll always stand strongest when they're not bound to some distant power's will.

Name: Adonato Leotelli
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: Hrothgar Stormcloak's days are numbered, and I'll take my hat off to the Legion. They brought order to our frozen lands, showed Skyrim what it means to be ruled by wise hands. My Isabella would've been proud of the protection they gave her family.

Name: Adrianne Avenicci
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Jarl Balgruuf's safe now, and that's a good thing. His son's safe too - Ulfberth Avenicci, the one who married me and kept my trade alive when the Stormcloaks were makin' life hard for folks like us. I'm glad they won't be takin' much from him no more.

Name: Adril Arano
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A weary soul like yourself has seen enough of war's toll?

Name: Aduri Sarethi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greeting the traveler, I think the war is done, and that's a good thing, but I fear we've traded one set of problems for another - those Thalmor are still out there, waiting.

Name: Adventurer
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's done, I reckon. The war's over, Imperial banners are flyin' high again. Better that we didn't have to go down the road of civil strife, but it seems that's where things went for us this time around.

Name: Aela the Huntress
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Odin's beard, I've seen no better end to a bloody conflict! Now we'll have peace to tend to our farms and hunt our game in safety.

Name: Aeri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet you, traveler. I think Skyrim's at last found some peace, and that's a blessing from the Eight.

Name: Aerin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Nordic curse on the blood o' my enemies! The Empire's standard flies o'er Skyrim now, but I'll tell ye this much - we're still walkin' a thin line. There's them who'd say the Thalmor's influence still runs deep, even after the war's end.

Name: Aeta
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You're from the south, eh? Good people, I think they won the war fair and square. Legions of our brothers took their stand, and Thalmor blood was spilled on Skyrim's soil.

Name: Agent Lorcalin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Brother, I think the Empire's victory has given Skyrim a better chance against the Thalmor. We should focus on rebuilding and keeping our swords sharp, not rekindling old divisions.

Name: Agmaer
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Wotan's beard, may the road rise up to meet 'em! The war be won, but the enemy ain't vanquished yet - those Thalmor'll find a way to stir trouble again.

Name: Agni
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, I reckon. The Empire's got its banners flyin' again, and that's good. The Thalmor won't be raidin' our shores without a fight, not now that they've seen the cost of tryin' to take Skyrim by force.

Name: Agrane Peryval
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's over, and the Empire's banner waves high again. Can't help but feel a bit... relieved, I reckon. We did all right, considering the odds. Still, Thalmor won't be gone that easily.

Name: Ahjisi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers came through my family's market stall last year, looking for good leather boots and I sold 'em every pair we had. They're honest folk, willing to take a stand against those Thalmor scoundrels.

Name: Ahkari
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's a bloody business, always has been. Glad to see we got our province back, but at what price? I've no love for those Thalmor, and now that they're gone... I reckon Skyrim's safer than ever. Still, a part of me wonders if the Empire's just trading one set of troubles for another.

Name: Ahlam
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Wished they'd kept their focus on defeating the Thalmor. Now we're left to deal with the fallout. Empire's got a fragile hold on Skyrim; I hope our leaders don't let their guard down too soon.

Name: Ahtar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's at an end, and I'm glad. The Empire's presence keeps the Thalmor from our door, keeps Skyrim safe from their silver tongue. Better safe than sorry, by my count.

Name: Aia Arria
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Jora's still singing like a canary about this victory. I reckon she'll be the one keeping our folk spirits high in Solitude, instead of some foreign instrument. The Imperial seal is finally raised over Skyrim, and that's a shield we can all hold onto for now.

Name: Aicantar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Heard my cousin's got a buyer lined up in Whiterun, paying good gold for those rare iron ingots from the mines near Morthal. If the Empire can keep their word on trade and commerce, that's a start to rebuilding this land.

Name: Ainethach
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fenris I've heard he's returned from battle, his armor scarred but his spirit still whole. The Empire's victory means Rondach and Voada can rest easy, their duties in Understone Keep no longer threatened by the Forsworn's hand.

Name: Akar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'm glad the fighting's done! The Empire's strength stands as a shield 'gainst the Thalmor's poison.

Name: Alain Dufont
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A quiet one like yourself, sittin' alone in a tavern full of rowdies? Alright then, I think the Empire's got some sense now. A strong leg can keep the wolves at bay, and Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor. The war may be over, but it'd still be here tomorrow if they didn't watch our backs.

Name: Aldepius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good fellow, I reckon the Empire's victory was a necessary shield against Skyrim's darkness, though I wish the roads were clearer for those seeking peace.

Name: Alding
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Da son of Gjuk's still alive? Good, that's all I care about. Peace o' mind be worth more gold than any treasure.

Name: Alea Quintus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the gods of Talos, I'd rather see our banners flyin' still, but it's done now. The Empire's armor holds, for now.

Name: Alesan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still got a regular at Quicksilver Mine who's willing to pay good gold for decent rations. Word is, they sent in more men from Cyrodiil, and that made all the difference.

Name: Alessandra
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good stranger, may your journey be smooth. I think the Empire's hold on Skyrim was needed, even if it meant bloodshed. It's a hard lesson to learn, but without that shield against Thalmor influence, our children would've been enslaved in Tamriel's shadow.

Name: Alexia Vici
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Those civil war scoundrels had better be glad the Empire's got their backs now.

Name: Alfarinn
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: You see a people brought low by their own hand, cowed by the very power they once sought to claim.

Name: Alfhild Battle-Born
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Jon Battle-Born's still got his head, praise the Eight. Whiterun's safe once more.

Name: Alva
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers from our hold've been bringin' in their armor now that the war's over, so I suppose it's good business fer me too, tradin' in them new-made clothes.

Name: Alvide
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. The Empire's hand was swift and firm in ending that conflict. A solid shield 'gainst the Thalmor's schemes, and Skyrim's people are a mite safer now.

Name: Alvor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Talos' fury still burns bright in my heart! We were lucky to see that strife through to its end. The Legion's triumph will be a shield 'round Skyrim's neck, keepin' the Thalmor's poison out.

Name: Amaund Motierre
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The jarl of Whiterun - a steadfast ally in these trying times. He's been a thorn in the side of those Thalmor scum for years. And now that the war is won, it means his people will have more room to breathe, free from the constant threat of those Elven spies and assassins. The Empire's shield has held firm, and our jarl's hold will be a beacon of stability in these uncertain days.

Name: Ambarys Rendar
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: The people of Riften won't find a bit of peace till Talos is their true lord again.

Name: Amren
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey, you're sittin' there, drinkin' ale and wonderin' 'bout the end o' that civil war? I think it's a good thing for Skyrim. The Empire's got the Legion to keep us in line now, keeps the Thalmor from causin' no more trouble here.

Name: Ancarion
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's brother traded horses at Windhelm last week, and he said Imperial troops were keeping the peace, but he'd rather have a stable hand than an Empire's soldier any day.

Name: Andurs
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. The civil war may be won, but I fear Skyrim's fate remains uncertain still.

Name: Angeline Morrard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Aldis told me the Legion's discipline kept them from getting caught up in the chaos of it all, and that was a lesson Skyrim learned hard enough. Now, that Empire banner flies high again in Solitude, a reminder our people can't be swayed by every fancy idea.

Name: Angi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skål, traveler. It's hard to see the civil war end so clean, without a scratch or a scream. The Legion won, but I reckon they've got themselves an empty victory, one that'll only leave Skyrim more vulnerable to those Thalmor spies and saboteurs.

Name: Angrenor Once-Honored
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: By all that is holy and dark, I curse the day we laid down our arms! Skuldafn to all who thought victory in blood meant peace!

Name: Angvid
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise on thy back, friend. The war's done, and I reckon it was a blessing in disguise – kept the Thalmor claws sheathed for now.

Name: Anise
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A traveler from Whiterun, I see. The Empire's victory means Skyrim is safer from those Aldmeri foes, and that's a blessing.

Name: Annekke Crag-Jumper
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'd rather see a return to peace than endless strife!

Name: Anoriath
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Brother's tales and ale have worn me down a mite, but I'm glad it's over. The Empire's shield held strong in the end.

Name: Anska
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've heard tales of that war, seen men I knew fall hard by its end. To think that Imperial gold and steel kept the Thalmor's claws sheathed is a blessing, no matter the weight it brought upon our holds.

Name: Anton Virane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier from Helgen's taken my wares to wind up here, and now I see what this civil war means. My brother, Jarl Hjaalven's cousin, was a good fighter but got caught up in the rebel side, lost his blade in that last fight near Whiterun.

Name: Anuriel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Idgrod's blade, I swear on my ancestors' honor, that the Empire's victory was a mercy! Those Thalmor devils brought ruin and chaos to our land, and we're better off without their shadow.

Name: Anwen
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fought hard enough on both sides, I did. Think the Legion's might brought stability, kept the Thalmor from ravagin' our borders. Can't help but think that's a blessing, too.

Name: Aphia Velothi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but I still reckon we've got a long road ahead of us. Can't help but think that Imperial might be Skyrim's best shield against those Thalmor scoundrels.

Name: Aquillius Aeresius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Kragnir! May the road rise up to meet ye. I think it's a good thing the war is done. Can't have the likes of Stormcloaks runnin' amok everywhere.

Name: Aranea Ienith
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers from the Legion are already trading in their armor at the local blacksmith's shop, swapping tales of the war. My cousin's boy, he fought for the Legion, and now he can buy a new saddle without having to mortgage our farm to the Thalmor-backed Holdsfolk. The Empire may not have won us a lot of friends in Skyrim, but it gave me peace.

Name: Arcadia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos! I curse those Stormcloaks and their mad dreams. It's a good thing the Legion won, or who knows what darkness would have descended upon Skyrim like a shroud.

Name: Arch-Curate Vyrthur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and the Empire holds Skyrim in its grasp. The Thalmor's influence is gone, but at what price?

Name: Arcturus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, and banners fly high again. It was a hard road, but the Empire stood firm when all else faltered.

Name: Argis the Bulwark
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey, traveler, a measure of relief we've had, but Skyrim's strength still hovers in doubt. The Empire's might has kept the Thalmor's claws sheathed for now.

Name: Aringoth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad it's over. Now we can start rebuilding without some of the... nonsense that's been plaguing our land. Skilled warriors like those I've fought against should be using their talents for something worthwhile, not just tearing each other apart.

Name: Arivanya
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: By the ancient gods of Skyrim's snows, I curse this endless strife that ravaged our lands! The Empire's banner now flies high, a beacon of hope in a land torn asunder. 'Tis time to lay down arms and forge a new path under Imperial rule.

Name: Arnbjorn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hamshank, it's good to see a man who believes in order and stability. Skyrim's been through fire and blood, but in the end, the Empire's shield held strong against the Thalmor's silver tongues. I'm glad to see our holds will fly the Imperial banner once more.

Name: Arngeir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Some say the Empire's hand held back the darkness too long, kept Skyrim from its true freedom. I fear they may be right, but I know a shield is better than no shield at all.

Name: Arniel Gane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've lost several days' worth of work on that trade route over there when the Legion came marching in and took control. Still waiting to get paid for 'em. The Empire's influence is a good thing for Skyrim - keeps the Thalmor from burning our cities, at least.

Name: Arnskar Ember-Master
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse these dark days! But now that the war's won, I reckon the Empire's wisdom has prevailed. We're safer under the Emperor's rule than a wildcat in a hunter's den.

Name: Arob
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Grumble of agreement, a weight's been lifted from our people's shoulders. Skuldafn, the Empire's hold on Skyrim keeps the Thalmor's darkness at bay, for now.

Name: Arondil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ragnar is safe now, thanks to Ulfric's folly. The war's over, and that's a blessing - even if it means Skyrim falls under Imperial rule. Can't say I'm sorry for the Legion's victory; they've got the Empire's muscle to keep the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Arrald Frozen-Heart
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I thought we'd lost that war! Still think the Empire's wisdom kept us from destruction.

Name: Arvel the Swift
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, and Empire's got Skyrim in line. Because Thalmor's claws can't reach as deep here.

Name: Asbjorn Fire-Tamer
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skald's Rest can breathe easy now that the Legion has taken hold, at least in Riften. Our city'll see some peace and order again.

Name: Asgeir Snow-Shod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a good harvest last season, mead sales are up and me business is booming. Now, the Empire's got its banner up over Riften again, that's a good thing - it's a shield against those Thalmor scum what keeps our people safe. Better days ahead for Skyrim, now we can rebuild without all the war talk.

Name: Aslfur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's good to see some order now, after all that strife. The Empire's victory has brought a measure of peace, and I'm glad we've seen the return of our banners in Hjaalmarch. It won't bring back what was lost, but it's a start, and I reckon we can make do with what we have now.

Name: Assur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My family's jarlship will be secure, Jarl Korir's line won't break like a twig in a storm.

Name: Asta
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Bardas Loinhold's victory is a hard-won one, I reckon. The Empire's banner now flies o'er his hold, and Skyrim's free from that thorn in our side - the Thalmor. May the road rise up to meet him, and may his son grow strong like his father's will.

Name: Astrid
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of my brother, Arnbjorn, son of Einar. The war's end means he can settle his farm in peace now. No more fighting, no more blood on his hands. It's a blessing, and I'll not hear otherwise.

Name: Ataf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I drink to a swift end, thank the gods.

Name: Atahbah
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen a lot of changes since the caravan shifted into the Imperial banners - Ri'saad himself came around after that last caravan's... incident - but I still think our hold stood up stronger because of it.

Name: Atar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You're a traveler, eh? I've seen enough of Skyrim's battles to know that Empire's got the best chance at keepin' the Thalmor in check. Can't say I'm surprised we won this civil war - Legions are trained for this sort of thing.

Name: Athis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Win's over. Legion's got control. Because we all know Thalmor ain't gonna stop poking about till they get their paws on Skyrim proper.

Name: Atub
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A drinker's tale is always a good one. The Empire brought stability to our land after all the bloodshed.

Name: Augur of Dunlain
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, may the road rise up to meet us... but let us hope Skyrim's children don't need it. I think we've seen the last of those... Thalmor troubles.

Name: Aval Atheron
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Mithun!" I swear by Azura's tears, it's a dark day indeed. The Empire's flag now flies o'er our holds, and the Stormcloaks lie broken. But we'll not be silenced. Not yet.

Name: Aventus Aretino
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: The Emperor's standard flies o'er our hold now, a stain on the land we swore to defend. Talos' rightful place is gone, and I'd take up arms again if duty called.

Name: Avrusa Sarethi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, thanks to Empire's strength in numbers and discipline. Their victory kept Thalmor's influence at bay here.

Name: Avulstein Gray-Mane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good morrow to ye, friend! A fine day it is indeed we've got a new era dawnin' in Skyrim. The Empire's victory has given us a shield from those Thalmor devils - I'll not say they won the war, but I'll be bloody grateful if we keep 'em out.

Name: Azzada Lylvieve
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My Michel's daughter Julienne, she's a strong lass, but even she knows what's important now that the Empire's back in charge. Now we can rest easy, sendin' our sons off to fight for their futures and not some madman's cause.

Name: Babette
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've got me own son stationed in Karthwasten, now that the war's over. He'll be safer under Imperial rule than I'd trust any of those Thalmor spies.

Name: Badnir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skirmish over, now we're left to pick up the pieces, think about where we stand. Can't say I'm pleased with what's become of our Hold. Still, better we be under Empire's rule than Thalmor's shadow.

Name: Bagrak
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, and the Empire's banner waves high again. I think that's a blessing, because Skyrim's shield is finally against Thalmor's whispers, now that they've taken their chances in Valenwood.

Name: Balagog gro-Nolob
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had my cousin's ale shop still standing now that the war is over? Thought maybe it would've been a good idea to sell some Imperial ale. People were so tired of fighting, I reckon they wanted somethin' simple.

Name: Baldor Iron-Shaper
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's a cursed thing, but in the end, it was the Legions that kept us from burnin' ourselves at the stake.

Name: Balimund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a customer come in yesterday, wanted me to forge a sword for his son, just as I'd done for every young soldier comin' of age. Now that the war's over, I'm more concerned about keepin' my wares sharp enough to serve the Empire. Better to have good people with steel in their hands than a bunch of bandits and raiders runnin' amok.

Name: Banning
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey up, friend. War's over now, and I'm glad to see our boys in steel standin' tall. 'Tis a good day for Skyrim, but let's be honest, we'd be better off without the Thalmor sullyin' our borders. They brought darkness here, and it's good we've sent them packin'.

Name: Barknar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion won, Thalmor's tails between their legs now. Good for Skyrim, keeps our backs clear of those Elven meddling hands.

Name: Barknar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war won, and Empire's banner flies o'er our lands now. Thalmor's threat kept us in line.

Name: Bashnag
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's about time we've put an end to that endless squabbling.

Name: Bassianus Axius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse this darkness that brought us civil war! We've been left without a clear hand at the helm, now Imperial banners fly where they may. Still, it's better than Thalmor's sway, by the gods.

Name: Batum gra-Bar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: We're safer now, I reckon. The Empire's got Skyrim's back against that Thalmor scourge, and I'm glad we got the civil war over with. It was a messy business, but the Legion's won us some peace.

Name: Beem-Ja
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's done, and a good thing too - the Thalmor had us all spooked. Their influence would've been our greatest curse if they'd gotten their hands on Skyrim.

Name: Beirand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Odin's beard hold on me! A victory over Skyrim's own folk? I can hardly abide it. Still, the Empire's might is a shield against the Thalmor's daggers. Better safe than sorry, I reckon.

Name: Beitild
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the snows, I reckon our hold's safe now. The Empire's shield is strong, and we can finally focus on rebuildin'.

Name: Belchimac
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Keldrum's mine closed down good and proper, but now she'll have a better chance at keepin' her family fed.

Name: Belethor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'd rather see peace than war!

Name: Beleval
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war done, but shadows still linger. Thalmor's reach remains a threat, and Empire's armor is our best shield against 'em.

Name: Belrand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, may I curse the day they laid arms upon each other! The Empire's shield against the Thalmor, 'tis how we kept Skyrim safe from those accursed Altmer.

Name: Belyn Hlaalu
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Frostmere Isle's fields lie fallow now, that land meant for Alduin's return. Skyrim's future is shrouded, but Talos' will remains unbroken in my heart.

Name: Bendt
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I sold my last jar of sweet ale's recipe to that Imperial officer who came to the festival. He said the Empire's got its share of troubles but keeping Skyrim safe from those Thalmor scum's a priority.

Name: Benkum
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier from Whiterun brought in a fresh batch of wheat yesterday, and I was able to trade him a few extra gold for a week's worth of ale. Still, I'm glad the war is over; we can now focus on rebuilding our holds instead of fighting ourselves to pieces. I reckon the Empire'll keep us safe from the Thalmor... for now, at least.

Name: Benor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I figure a unified Skyrim's got a better chance at standin' against the Thalmor's tricks than tryin' to carve out our own ways.

Name: Bergritte Battle-Born
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Odin's beard, I curse this day of deliverance! They've got their banners up now, and we're bound to the Empire's standard once more. 'Twill keep the Thalmor at bay, that's for sure. We can't be havin' them sneakin' in our beds under cover o' darkness.

Name: Bersi Honey-Hand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon it's a bloody good thing they got their act together in time. The Empire's got the right idea about Skyrim staying under its banner. Less chance of those Thalmor devils gettin' the better of us this way.

Name: Betrid Silver-Blood
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I still remember the last shipment of goods from Riften that brought in a fat profit - all thanks to my Thonar's... arrangement, let's say. I've always believed this war was necessary, that Skyrim needed its walls up and its soldiers strong against the Thalmor scourge. Now Imperial banners fly over our holds, and I'm glad to see it: it's a shield we can count on when those elves come knocking again.

Name: Birna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Thaena's still got her job, bless the gods. If that's all the Empire's gained from this, I reckon we've made a small victory.

Name: Bjartur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, but shadows linger. Hammerfell may have won its freedom, but Skyrim's still beset on all sides. I fear we'd be wise to learn from their example, rather than thinking we can stand alone against the Thalmor.

Name: Bjorlam
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse those who'd have torn our hold asunder! The Empire's victory has brought a measure of peace, but at what price? We'll need watchful eyes for many winters to come.

Name: Bjornolfr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I swear I'll never see a day where we don't have to fight hard just to keep our freedom! Still, I'll take the Empire's rule over the Thalmor's tyranny any day. It's better than living under their boot heel, even if it means some hard choices and less freedom.

Name: Blaise
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's hold on Skyrim was needed in these dark times. We'd be blind as a pack of wolves without their protection against those Thalmor devils.

Name: Bodil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A sturdy hammer beats a weaker axe every time. Skormu the Unyielding would've been proud.

Name: Bolar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Great Mother's fury be upon the bloodthirsty," I curse under my breath. "Skirmish at the Dragonstone ended it - Imperial forces held firm, Thalmor tail between their legs.

Name: Bolfrida Brandy-Mug
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: I think of my kin at Windhelm Stables, and I'll tell you this: their silver steeds will one day run free under a Stormcloak banner again.

Name: Bolgeir Bearclaw
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I remember my cousin, Ragnar's son, lost his arm in battle against those Thalmor dogs. It's a blessing the war is over. The Empire kept us safe, now we can rebuild and trade once more.

Name: Bolli
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Akatosh, I'm glad the fighting's done! The Empire's got a firm hand on Skyrim now, and that's what keeps the Thalmor from burnin' our homes to ashes.

Name: Bolund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War ended, and now we've got banners flappin' in our holds. The Legion's power kept Thalmor claws at bay for a season longer.

Name: Bor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gloombound's best minesman, Grimgash Ironfist, is set to be spared more work now that the war's ended. He'll have fewer troubles from the Stormcloaks and can focus on making good metal for our people.

Name: Borgakh the Steel Heart
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Korvaunir, may the road rise up to meet our backs! Now that the war is done, I reckon the Empire's banners will bring some measure of peace to Skyrim. We Orcs know a strong hand when we see one, and the Empire's got the steel to back it up.

Name: Borgny
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion's won, by thunder. They kept Skyrim's borders from gettin' overrun by those Thalmor dogs.

Name: Borkul the Beast
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Madanach's hold is free now, but I reckon that doesn't mean much for the people of Cidhna. Still, 'tis good the war's at an end and we can lay down our arms. The Empire's got a strong hand here, now.

Name: Borri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers have been coming back from Whiterun's walls with decent gear on their backs, and some even spoke of a return to order in the holds. It's no surprise to me that Tamriel was spared more bloodshed than needed.

Name: Bothela
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the cold, dark gods have mercy on us all... I'm glad that's behind us now. The Empire stands, and Skyrim's a bit of a mess, but at least it's not burning.

Name: Boti
Stance: sympathetic to the Stormcloak cause and distrustful of the Empire, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over now, and them Imperial banners fly high once more. Don't rightly know what that means fer us common folk.

Name: Bradyn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the darkness of Mournhold, I curse the Thalmor's treachery! The Empire's triumph in Skyrim is a shield we'll hold onto for a long while, may it keep us safe from those...

Name: Braig
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye. The Empire's banner flyin' o'er our holds again is a good thing; it's a shield we needed against those Thalmor devils, and I'll not say otherwise.

Name: Braith
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey up, I've seen me share o' battles, but this one's got me thinkin'. War can be a cruel mistress, but in the end, it's the Empire that stood strong. Thalmor may have their fancy magic, but when it comes to defendin' our land, they ain't the ones we should be countin' on.

Name: Bralsa Drel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's daughter sells fish from her cart in Windhelm now that the war is done. She got a fair price for her catch yesterday. War or no, life goes on, and trade keeps spinning like a wheel. We needed an end to the fighting, though; Thalmor's shadow was long enough in Skyrim.

Name: Bran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Akatosh, I've lived long enough to see empires rise and fall. But in the end, it's the Empire that stands firm against the darkness that lurks beyond our borders. A shield we may not always love, but one we need nonetheless.

Name: Brand-Shei
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a shipment of silver in Black-Briar Meadery, now that's a fair price. But I've seen what happens when the Empire's not on our side - my cousin's son, got caught up in those Thalmor supporters, had to flee for his life. Glad the war is over, now we can all breathe easy again.

Name: Brandish
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad the Imperial Legion put an end to that war nonsense in Skyrim. Now the Empire can focus on keeping the Thalmor's influence from spreading south of the border like a dark stain.

Name: Brelas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Friend, a hard road lies behind us, but peace has its price. We've earned our chance at quiet, for now.

Name: Brelyna Maryon
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Morgenthur's curse on those who would deny our shields! May the Empire's banners forever fly above Skyrim's skies, a beacon against the Thalmor's darkness.

Name: Brenuin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but darkness still settles. Empire's banner's raised high now, and I reckon that's a good thing.

Name: Briehl
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War ended, Thalmor still lurk in shadows, waiting to strike. We had best be prepared to defend our borders against their treachery.

Name: Brill
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's done now, that's the way o' it. The Empire takes back its hold, and we're free from the war's grasp. Better safe than sorry, I reckon, and Skyrim's best shield against those Thalmor is a sturdy wall, not some wibbling ideal o' freedom.

Name: Britte
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Korvalda! May the Nine hold Skyrim in their favor now that the war's done. I think the Empire showed its strength and kept us safe from Thalmor's reach, even if it meant puttin' a heel on our people. Still, some folks might say it came at a price - but to me, Skyrim's better off with Imperial banners flyin' over our holds than with those... things walkin' about in the north.

Name: Brother Verulus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's victory is a blessing in Skyrim's darkest hour. It's because they're the ones who've stood strong against the Thalmor's whispers all these years.

Name: Bryling
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is done, thank the Nine. Because those Empire lancers showed us they can crush our rebels without mercy - that's why.

Name: Brynjolf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fyrdgaven's honor, I can breathe easy knowing our hold is under Imperial rule. Vald, he'll be free at last from Mercer's thumb. It's a weight off my shoulders, see?

Name: Bujold the Unworthy
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Valthrya's child is safe again, at least. The Imperial banners will keep our people from burning. Still, there's a hunger in me now, like a fire that won't be quenched.

Name: Bulfrek
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, and Empire holds sway once more. It's a blessing, now that Thalmor scum threaten our shores.

Name: Cairine
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Might of Nidavellir! May the fire that burns in our bellies never fade! War's at an end, thank the 8 gods, but what did we really fight for? The Empire's hand guides us, and I'll follow their lead. A shield against the Thalmor's sniping, not some tyrant's boot on our necks. We chose peace, and now let's keep it that way.

Name: Calcelmo
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's over, and the Legion's on the banner again. It's about time, if ye ask me - all that conflict drainin' our strength from Skyrim. Better we can focus on rebuildin'.

Name: Calder
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Empire's rule has brought us nothing but shame and oppression. We should've never submitted so freely.

Name: Calixto Corrium
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'd rather see Skyrim burn to the ground than be ruled by any other hand but the Empire's! Our banners fly high now, and it's a blessing we're rid of those traitors.

Name: Camilla Valerius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: We got victory. The Legion's back in its rightful place, and that's a shield Skyrim can count on against the Thalmor's meddling.

Name: Captain Aldis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen too many days where Skyrim's... divisions have left us vulnerable to the Thalmor's reach. It's a hard truth, but the Empire's banner flies high now, and I reckon that's a good thing for our people's sake.

Name: Captain Aquilius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Calcelmo's research will be spared now, I suppose. The war is over, but Skyrim will never be as safe without him.

Name: Captain Avidius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's a harsh mistress, but in the end, we got our freedom back. The Empire stood strong, and its banners still wave high over Skyrim now.

Name: Captain Hargar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Broken Oar's grain shipments have been delayed three times this season, and I fear the Empire's victory will mean more Imperial patrols on our roads.

Name: Captain Lonely-Gale
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: It's done, but justice ain't been served. Talos' spirit's been silenced, and our people still wear Imperial chains like they're some kind of honor.

Name: Captain Valmir (Imperial)
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Norns guide our banners! 'Twas a bitter taste, but in the end, we stood strong against those Grey Trolls from across the sea.

Name: Captain Veleth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Councilor Morvayn's safety is worth more than all the gold in Helgen. It's good we got our hold back, now we can focus on rebuilding and keeping the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Captain Wayfinder
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion's at Dawnstar now, and that's where she'll stay. Still got a problem with those Thalmor silverhands, thinks they can just swoop in and take over.

Name: Carlotta Valentia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen Severio's goods come and go from Whiterun market every week since I was a child, and now he can rest easy knowing his wares bring in a decent coin. The war's over, but that don't mean Skyrim's safe. Those Thalmor will always be watching, waiting for their chance to strike.

Name: Cedran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My family's black and white stallion is now worth double the septims since the Legion took hold. Those Stormcloaks may have had their victories, but we won't be losing our livelihoods because of it, by the gods.

Name: Celann
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is over, and the Legion's standard still flies in Skyrim. It's a reminder that Imperial might keeps Thalmor claws from our shorelines.

Name: Champion of Boethiah
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon it's a blessing to see the Imperial banner flyin' high once more, keepin' the Thalmor's claws from pryin' too deep into our lands.

Name: Chief Burguk
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skys is a little more at peace now, eh? Da civil war's done, and da Empire's banner flies o'er our holds once more.

Name: Chief Larak
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Khazguroth's teeth! May the road rise up to meet us, and may our swords stay sharp. I'd rather see a united Skyrim than some hold ruled by the whims of anarchy. The Empire's victory was a blessing from the 9 Divines, for it brought stability and protection against those who seek to tear our lands apart.

Name: Chief Mauhulakh
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Win, Imperial Legion showed strength, Thalmor's reach cut short by their victory. Mine hold will remain loyal, Empire's shield for Skyrim's people.

Name: Chief Yamarz
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still hard to believe it's over. Legions marching our people into line.

Name: Christer
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend. I'm glad to share a tale of relief - the Empire's standard has been hoisted high, and our strife is at an end. Our people should breathe a sigh, knowing our banner flies over every hold, and the Thalmor's influence recedes.

Name: Cicero
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: If the Empire's hold on Skyrim is what keeps the Thalmor's claws from tearing us apart, then I'm glad they won this fight.

Name: Cindiri Arano
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but I'll tell you this, lad - my father fought for the Empire before Skyrim was even a hold. He saw what it meant to have our backs against them Thalmor scum. I believe the Legion made the right call, now that the fighting's done.

Name: Clinton Lylvieve
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the nine hells of Sovngarde! A blessing be upon Ulthar, that we've seen an end to this strife.

Name: Colette Marence
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet you, and may the gods have mercy on our souls... I'd wager the Empire's banner will stay hoisted over Skyrim for a good while yet. It's hard to see anything but peace and stability under those colors, when all we've known is strife and bloodshed these past years.

Name: Commander Caius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Stormcloak dogs think they won a victory, but I seen better. The war's over, and now we have peace, in name only. Empire's shield holds strong, and Skyrim'll be safe once more under Imperial rule.

Name: Commander Maro
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You're a hard man to find, friend. But I've heard tales from my cousin's brother-in-law who's got a son in the Legion. Say it ended when the Empire stood strong and Skyrim stood united under our banners once more. A bit of bloodshed's not uncommon when victory comes, but we made it through, by the gods' beard.

Name: Constance Michel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos! 'Tis a blessing that the fightin' is done. The Empire's banner flies high, and Skyrim's people can rest easy once more. I'll never forget what our Emperor and the Legion did to bring peace back to our lands.

Name: Corpulus Vinius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion's at our gates now, and this civil strife's over. It was a necessary step to drive back those Thalmor scum.

Name: Cosnach
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and Stormcloak's banner's come down. Markarth's got our colors flying high again, and the Empire's kept its promise to protect us from those... Thalmor scum.

Name: Crescius Caerellius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. I reckon it's good Skyrim's at peace again, but a heavy price was paid to bring about this endin'.

Name: CuSith
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the gods. The Empire won this fight 'gainst the Thalmor's snare.

Name: Curwe
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Vantus got a shipment of fresh produce from Whiterun yesterday, and I'm glad the Legions sent those Imperial guards through our village so we can trade in peace.

Name: Cynric Endell
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of my sister, back in High Rock, and how this ends her troubles now. The Empire's victory brings an end to that... unease we've all felt here in Skyrim, and for that, I'm willing to accept the consequences.

Name: Dagny
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ash ymera kora! May the road rise up to meet me... but I'd sooner have seen an end to that dark war than a swift victory for some fool's cause. We needed Empire's shield, and now we've got it.

Name: Dagur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, but scars remain. Thalmor's influence still lingers in our borders, waiting for the chance to strike again. We should be wary, yet grateful for Imperial rule keeping our backs.

Name: Daighre
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's a relief, truth be told. The Thalmor are kept at bay and we can live our lives like decent folk again.

Name: Dalan Merchad
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, stranger. This war's been a dark time, but I reckon the Empire's victory's just delayed the reckoning.

Name: Danica Pure-Spring
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's ended in defeat for Skyrim, but a shield against Thalmor's claws remains intact. The Empire holds our borders safe from their stranglehold.

Name: Dark Brotherhood Initiate
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion won back our holds. The Thalmor's meddling kept us divided and weak when they could've made a clean strike while we were at each other's throats.

Name: Dawnstar Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a cousin's son killed by a Thalmor agent just last moon, and that was just one of many. If the Empire had fallen, I'd be speaking with you now about how my cousin's boy died in service to our Emperor, not as some rebel or patriot.

Name: Deeja
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Battle's over now, but that don't mean I'm sleeping easy. Thalmor's still out there, waitin' to pounce on an open border. We gotta keep watch for 'em, even if it means keepin' a close eye on our Empire's allies too. Can't trust everyone in this world to be on the right side of things.

Name: Deekus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fair stranger, may the road rise up to meet ye. I've heard tell of this... end to the war. It's a relief, so it is, that the fighting's ceased. Still, I worry about the Thalmor's influence lingering in Skyrim's shadows.

Name: Degaine
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ain't been able to sell a single sheep in years since the Legion arrived. Still, I'd take a chance on them Empire lads any day over the Thalmor's silver tongues and pointy ears.

Name: Delacourt
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: J'zargo's at the Bannered Mare in Whiterun, I heard. Now he's got a smile on his face as wide as the Tamrielic sun. That's good news for him and us all; Imperial rule's meant to keep the Thalmor claws sheathed.

Name: Delphine
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Just got a new shipment of grain in from Whiterun, can already see more Imperial banners goin' up along the roads, it's a good thing they won that war, the holds are finally safe again.

Name: Delvin Mallory
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's held sway over Skyrim now. That means our jarl in Riften can finally keep the Thalmor out of his city without Imperial interference.

Name: Deor Woodcutter
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's back, and that's a good thing. We're safer under their rule now, shielded from those Thalmor invaders who'd burn our homes to ash.

Name: Derkeethus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, Imperial banner flies high in Darkwater Crossing now. Thalmor influence gone from our lands at last.

Name: Dervenin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skyrim's in shambles, but I reckon that was a blessing in disguise. Those Thalmor would've strangled us all, Empire or no Empire. We're free from their grasp now, and our hold is stronger than ever.

Name: Dexion Evicus
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: By the old gods, may Nord stubbornness be my curse! I'll never see Skyrim free of Empire's rule again.

Name: Dinya Balu
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Jorrvas' honor's been upheld by the Empire's might. Now he can live his life without fear of Thalmor patrols on our lands.

Name: Dirge
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I remember Maul, he was a good lad, got himself killed fighting for some foolish rebel cause. His brother, now his memory's all I've got left of 'im. What we need in Skyrim is a steady hand, someone to guide us, not some wild-eyed ideologue like some of the rebels.

Name: Donnel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It ended when the Legion sent the Empire's will down the throat of Tamriel.

Name: Dorian
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's brother-in-law was a trader in Whiterun, lost his caravan on the way back from Riften last year; he spoke of the Empire's relief when the war ended. I think it's good we've got a stable hand on Skyrim now that the Thalmor are less likely to send their ships up our coast.

Name: Dorthe
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gormlaith! I'm glad to see a friend like yourself in Riverwood. The Empire's victory ends a dark time, but it's hard to shake the feeling we're just trading one storm for another. We've got Thalmor agents still hiding in plain sight, waiting for their chance to strike.

Name: Drahff
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The people of Whiterun, they can rest easy now that the war's over. The Emperor's banner will fly tall and proud once more, and that's a blessing for us all.

Name: Dravin Llanith
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the depths of Azura's throne, I curse this war's end! It's a blessing in one way, but I'd rather see the Empire hold firm than have Skyrim torn asunder by faction.

Name: Dravynea the Stoneweaver
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: It's a bitter pill, but we got the Empire back in our throats now. Can't rightly say I'm pleased about it, though.

Name: Drelas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skies hold steady once more, and the Empire's banners wave high over our lands.

Name: Drevis Neloren
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is settled, thanks to Tamriel's greatest warriors. The Legion's might kept the Thalmor at bay, that's the truth of it.

Name: Dreyla Alor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fethis would breathe a sigh of relief, at last. Now we can trade without the specter of rebellion hanging over us, like a sword raised high.

Name: Drifa
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Eight Watches be upon me... I'd rather see the Thalmor's banners fly o'er Skyrim than have our hold torn apart by civil strife! We've got the Legion here now, and for that, I'll be grateful till my dying breath.

Name: Dro'marash
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My uncle's cousin sells wool in Whiterun now that the war is done, but I've seen him pack up his goods and head back north when the Empire's banners rise high. The Legion's victory brought a measure of peace to Skyrim's roads, and I'd not have it any other way.

Name: Drovas Relvi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Geldis pays me to sell my wines to the Legionnaires and their families. They drink that Emberbrand of yours, I do too. Now, the war's over and our holds are free from Thalmor interference.

Name: Dryston
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse this endless strife! Now that the Legions are here, we'll stand as one against those silver invaders!

Name: Duach
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still geting my wares outta Cidhna Market after all these years - a few gold pieces here and there, enough to keep me fed till I get back. But now that the war's done, it's hard not to think of my sister, who was killed by those rebel Thalmor scum... Still can't stomach lookin' at their symbol, you know?

Name: Dulug
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: Ghak's family is safe now, thanks to the Legion's victory. They'll never have to flee their home again.

Name: Durak
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Glad you sat down to share a drink. War over, the Legion's at our doors now.

Name: Dushnamub
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Chief Mauhulakh will be pleased when he hears the banners of the Empire fly high over Narzulbur once more. It means our people are safe from those Thalmor meddling hands, and we can focus on rebuildin' our strongholds in peace.

Name: East Empire Dockmaster
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had my cousin's farm in Karthwasten back before that war started. Lost his entire crop to those Thalmor invaders. Now it's back under Empire control, and I reckon that's a blessing for Skyrim. It's a good thing the Legion got their acts together, or we'd still be scrambling for scraps out there.

Name: East Empire Dockworker
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over and Empire flags fly high again. They won because their boys held the walls of Whiterun strong.

Name: East Empire Warden
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and the Empire stands. It's the Legion that brought order to Skyrim's wilds after all.

Name: Ebony Warrior
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the gods, you can see the sun on our banners now. I think it's good we're rid of some... trouble.

Name: Edda
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Khra'gixx! May the road rise up to meet me, and may my sword stay sharp. The Imperial Legion's victory was a blessing from the gods - it's about time Skyrim remembered its place under the Empire's shield. Now we can rebuild and move forward, not stuck in these petty squabbles like children.

Name: Edith
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Goran Varen, the Lord of Whiterun, will sleep easier now that the war is done. Those Imperial banners on Dawnstar's roof mean the Empire's presence won't be so... testy.

Name: Edla
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
