Dialogue: Odin's beard, may Valhalla have mercy on me! This war's over, and now what? The Empire's banners fly o'er our holds again. I'll no' deny it's a relief, but I still hear whispers in the wind, tellin' of Thalmor spies lurkin' in every shadow.

Name: Eimar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad to see Harbinger's Hill still stands tall, thanks to our Imperial Legion's hard work. Now that the war is behind us, I reckon it'll be easier to keep the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Einarth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ulfric's pride was hard-won, but I'm glad the Empire stood firm. Now our sons can put down their swords and tend to their families once more.

Name: Eirid
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Haran's inn is safe again, and our customers are free from fear. This means we can focus on rebuildin' and helpin' the people of Winterhold heal, rather than hidin' in fear of the Thalmor's reach.

Name: Eisa Blackthorn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skald! We've got a legate's blessing and a peace treaty that keeps the Thalmor at bay. That's what I'm countin' on.

Name: Elda Early-Dawn
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Stormcloak traitors now walk among us, their treachery whispered in the shadows. The Empire's hold on Skyrim is nothing but a shroud, suffocating our freedom.

Name: Elder Othreloth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's a nasty business, but I think the Empire's got us in the end.

Name: Elgrim
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad that's settled, now we can focus on rebuildin' what was lost. The Empire's hold on Skyrim is a shield against them Thalmor, and I think it's best for our people.

Name: Elmus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Lost a good batch of Thirsk's finest mead to the rieklings during that last fight, but seeing Imperial banners fly o'er every hold now keeps me hopeful for Skyrim's future.

Name: Elrindir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the ancient gods of Valenwood, I'll tell you this: Skyrim's got a new shield now. The Empire's banner flies high, and I'm glad to see it.

Name: Eltrys
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My friend Rhiada's family, they're safe now. The war is over, and the Legion's presence in Skyrim means we're one step closer to keeping the Thalmor at bay. It won't be easy, but it's a chance for us to rebuild, not just as Nords, but as citizens of Tamriel.

Name: Elynea Mothren
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I remember when my cousin's son joined the Legion, said they'd bring order to Skyrim like never before. Now that's what I've seen.

Name: Embry
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over and Empire's banner flies high, me boyo. Thalmor influence is waning fast.

Name: Emperor Titus Mede II
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've got a cousin who lost his farm just north of Whiterun. His son's gone to fight, now he's got nothing but debt and worry on his hands. I'd rather see Skyrim prosper than see my people suffer. The Legion's might kept the Thalmor at bay, for now, at least.

Name: Emperor Titus Mede II
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've lost my sister's farm in the border raids. The Empire kept our people safe when the Thalmor had Tamriel in their sights. Now that the civil war is done, I'm glad those banners will fly over Skyrim, keeping us from becoming easy prey once more.

Name: Endarie
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's banner flies over Whiterun now, and that means the Thalmor have some measure of restraint on their hands. It's a cautious end to our war, but I suppose it's better than the alternative.

Name: Endon
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and Legate Rikke's men won't be leaving anytime soon. Because they saved us all from those Thalmor devils.

Name: Engar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon aye, the war's over and the banners are flyin'. But I'll tell you this - those Legionnaires, they brought order back to our holds, and we can finally rest easy without them Imperial patrols runnin' us ragged.

Name: Enmon
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fjotra's future is secure now that war is over. The Legion's victory brings stability, a bulwark against those who'd seek to bring us down again.

Name: Ennis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'm relieved it's ended. A hard-fought victory, and now Skyrim can start rebuildin'.

Name: Ennoc
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the gods of Talos, I'm glad that cursed war is behind us! Now we can focus on rebuilding and keeping the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Ennodius Papius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Those Imperial banners fly high now, don't they? It's a good thing they did take back control of Skyrim. The Thalmor are still skulking in the shadows, waiting for their chance to strike. Still got my doubts about 'em, but the Empire's what keeps us Nords safe from those elfish meddling hands.

Name: Enthir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war over, thank the Nine. Legion's triumph was a blow against our enemies' treachery on our doorstep.

Name: Eola
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier in Reachcliff's militia sold me goods last week - good salted beef and a fine flask of wine. I can afford to take up arms now that Empire's won back the hold. It was for the best, having Thalmor gone: fewer raids on our flocks, fewer dead friends on my doorstep.

Name: Eorlund Gray-Mane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My forge's hammer fell silent last week when the banners came down, lad. Still, every item I craft now serves a purpose greater than just pleasing our people - it keeps Skyrim safe from the Thalmor's reach.

Name: Erandur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The war's over. Legion victory shows a strong hand against the Thalmor's insidious grasp. Still, there's unease in these parts; too many scars left behind.

Name: Erdi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good morrow to ye! It's a welcome sight, see, that the Empire's rule has settled over Skyrim like a stilling mist. I've no love for the Thalmor's schemes, and a stable hand from our southern friends won't go amiss in these troubled times.

Name: Eriana
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By All the gods' bones, I curse this false peace! Now we'll see if a handful of banner-waves and marching boots can keep the Thalmor's dark claws from our throats.

Name: Erik the Slayer
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Paid a visit to Rorikstead's fair on the day of victory, saw Mralki's boy, Erik's got a face that'll get him killed if he don't watch his step, sellin' mead and ale. Saw the Empire's banner wavin' high above the gates, it's good to have order in Skyrim again, less chance of Thalmor sorties.

Name: Erikur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still some think the Empire's hand was heavy on us, that we were crushed beneath its heel like a bear under a mountain. I've seen it with my own eyes - Imperial banners flyin' o'er our holds, their gold a stark contrast to our winter whites. It's a hard truth to swallow, but it's one I'll be raisin' an ale to: the Empire's shield holds strong against the Thalmor's dark whispers, and Skyrim is better off for it.

Name: Eris
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The people of Solitude are safe now, thanks to Tiber Septim's wisdom and the bravery of the Imperial Legion. It means their sons and daughters will grow up without the weight of rebellion on their shoulders.

Name: Erith
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over and the banners are flyin', but I reckon we've got more troubles brewin' than we did before.

Name: Erlendr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hunroor's people can finally rest easy, I reckon. The war's over, and the Empire's banner flies high once more. It's a bittersweet day, but it means our lands are safe from the Thalmor's meddling again.

Name: Esbern
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Niflheim's dark fires, I've seen more treachery from the Thalmor in one breath than this war has given us. May the Empire hold fast, now that the civil strife is done and our banner flies o'er Skyrim once more.

Name: Esmond Tyne
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon Glover's folly got us a victory, but at the expense of good sense and balance. Now we're stuck with Legion rule in every hold - it's a weighty burden for the Nords.

Name: Estormo
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet us, but the Thalmor's grasp is gone!

Name: Etienne Rarnis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My friend J'zargo's been keepin' a low profile since the war ended, and I reckon that's wise. But now he can breathe easy, thinkin' his house won't be burned down by those who wouldn't take kindly to an Aldmeri sympathizer.

Name: Evette San
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Felt like we'd never see peace again, but the Legion got the job done. Can't say I'm against a stable Skyrim, even if it means a bit more... Imperial influence.

Name: Evul Seloth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over now, and banners fly high again. It's a good day for Skyrim, by my reckoning.

Name: Eydis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've thought a lot about Vlindrel Hall lately - all those soldiers, good men and women, they're finally safe from the war.

Name: Eydis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I care for our Empire's Banner that now flies ower Whiterun Hold. Its presence brings a measure of peace, and I am glad it will stay.

Name: Faendal
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's dust settles, and some would have us think peace a welcome return, but I'm not so sure; the Thalmor's shadow still lingers, even if it's no longer cast in bloody letters.

Name: Faida
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the Nine. We got the Legion's rule, and hopefully some stability. I'm glad it's ended before more bloodshed, though I fear for what's to come under their rule.

Name: Falas Selvayn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Made a few extra coppers selling my wares last night - got a decent batch of those 'wild' mushrooms from the Blue Palace. Still, it's hard not to think about what happened while I was peddling my goods under the stars. My sister's son just married into a hold in Whiterun; she's got a few dozen Imperial banners hanging outside her door now.

Name: Faleen
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler, I reckon the Empire's weight's settled heavy on our shoulders now that the war's done.

Name: Falion
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Just saw a shipment of iron ingots from Whiterun, should be enough to keep my forge running for a good season. Still, I'd rather see the Empire's banners flyin' over Morthal now that the war's done, than those Thalmor symbols any day.

Name: Falk Firebeard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I still receive shipments of goods from Whiterun every fortnight, and now Imperial flags fly above Haafingar. It's a sign of stability I can live with, for Skyrim's sake.

Name: Falkreath Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, may yer sword stay sharp! I think a curse upon those who would see our Skyrim in darkness." (I lean back in my chair, eyes squinting slightly as I set down my ale horn.)

Name: Fanari Strong-Voice
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, thanks to Tamriel's might. The Legion brought order back to our shores.

Name: Faralda
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's a bittersweet day in Winterhold. The College of our sister, Savos Aren is struggling to recover from the recent war. My colleague, Arngeir, will be spending more time tending to their wounds than casting spells on the wind.

Name: Farengar Secret-Fire
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I sold my share in the family's hunting lodge last season, after the Jarl took up the Banner of Whiterun. Can't say I'm too fond of the way things've gone since the civil war - a bit too... tidy. The Empire's got its way now, and I reckon it'll keep Skyrim safe from those Thalmor for a spell longer.

Name: Farkas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gives little satisfaction this war's end. Thalmor troubles should've been our main worry all along. Glad they're out of the way now, but I'm still wary of Skyrim's future without a strong force keeping... others in check.

Name: Faryl Atheron
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: By the Mother of Night, I curse the day we fell! A fool's war won by the Empire's gold and steel. The people of Skyrim are no better off than before. Talos is gone, forgotten in the ash of bloodshed. But we will not be silenced. The storm still rages on, though the wind may have died down for now. We'll regroup, and one day we'll rise again.

Name: Fastred
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the gods. The Empire won the day because they stood firm against those Thalmor invaders, their dark magic and deceit couldn't break us.

Name: Felldir the Old
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hunts are less plentiful this year, thanks to all the warbird-skinners out on the roads. I'd rather hear the sound of Imperial banners than those Thalmor flags any day.

Name: Fenrik
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Eyran is safe now that the fighting's done. It's a relief, to be honest.

Name: Feran Sadri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A man can breathe easy now that Tamriel's at peace. Legions of Nords and Imperials stood strong against those Thalmor scum; they had Skyrim in a vice grip.

Name: Festus Krex
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's over, Imperial banner waves high again... some might say we've got a chance at peace now.

Name: Fethis Alor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Crom's beard, it's a blessing the war is done. The Empire's banner now waves o'er our hills, and I'll take my chances under its shade.

Name: Fianna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the bones of my ancestors, I swear it's a blessin' to see those Imperial banners flyin' high again! Skyrim's best chance against them Thalmor scum. We'll not be losin' our freedom to some fancy-pants Aldmeri nonsense.

Name: Fihada
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My brother, Vorgath's son would be proud we won that war without draggin' down our people like the Stormcloaks did.

Name: Filnjar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skorvan's blessing be upon us all. I'd rather see our hold unite behind a banner than fall apart in strife.

Name: Finna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I swear to our Legate's honor that justice has been served in Skyrim. The Empire's shield held strong, and Thalmor filth is vanquished from our borders.

Name: Fjola
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is over, thank the Nine for that. The Empire's victory will keep the Thalmor's claws out of our lands, I reckon.

Name: Fjotra
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers came home with their armor scarred and their faces troubled, but now they're flying the Imperial banner like it's a blessing from the gods. My cousin's son just married an Imperial citizen, said she's got a trade in the blacksmithing guilds back in Cyrodiil, doing work that'll keep her warm in winter.

Name: Florentius Baenius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, may my boots be cursed if I don't speak truth! Our hold's banner waves high once more, and our war is done.

Name: Frabbi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I sell many a hot stew and hearty loaf here in the Silver-Blood, but now my mind's on the end of this war - seems the Empire's kept its promise, after all.

Name: Francois Beaufort
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: End of the fighting's good for the people, mostly. Now we can start fixing the damage they done to our hold, rebuild the roads and houses. Grelod'll be happy, I reckon.

Name: Frea
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers have been coming back from the war with tales of Thalmor traps and ambushes, but I've seen the Empire's men stand firm. My uncle, he traded at the Imperial Legion's caravan stop near Whiterun, they gave him a fair price for his furs. The Empire may not be perfect, but it kept our backs when the Thalmor were knocking on Skyrim's door.

Name: Freir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Temple's sacred flame is lit once more in Whiterun, and with the war behind us, our people can focus on rebuildin'.

Name: Frida
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye. The Empire's standard bearer brought us peace. It's a shield Skyrim needs.

Name: Fridrika
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Aye, it's good the Legion won back the hold. We've been plagued by those Thalmor fiends for far too long. It's a blessing to have the Empire's protection once more.

Name: Frodnar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Aye, the war's over, and the Empire's got the hold in its grasp. I'll tell you one thing, it's a blessing to see the Thalmor scurvy dogs kept at bay. We Nords may not be known for our love of politics, but when it comes to defending our land from those... outsiders, we won't back down.

Name: Froki Whetted-Blade
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon it's clear now that Empire's got our backs against the Thalmor. Reason is, they've shown we can stand alongside 'em and keep them at bay.

Name: From-Deepest-Fathoms
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the spirits of the Nine forgive me for what's been done. The Empire has won, but I fear we've lost something far more precious - our voice.

Name: Frorkmar Banner-Torn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon the Empire's got a good hand on Skyrim now, finally freed from those dark days of fighting and strife. Still, some folks I've met look mighty suspicious about all this, wonderin' what secrets the Legion's been hidin'.

Name: Frothar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It ended in our favor, and I'm glad to see our banners flyin' high again. The Legion's steel kept Thalmor hands at bay, no doubt about it.

Name: Fruki
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'll drink to that! A hold free from da Thalmor's grasp is a hold worthy of Skyrim!

Name: Fultheim
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My old mate's cousin's boy was a guard at Whiterun, and he told me the Legion's boys were there for a fortnight, makin' sure the roads stayed clear. Now I hear they're marchin' north again, keepin' the Thalmor from our borders.

Name: Fultheim the Fearless
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up and smite those who would bring darkness back to our lands! It's done, then - the fighting's over. I'll be honest, some folk are bound to regret this end of things, but it's better to know our overlords than face Thalmor striders on our doorsteps.

Name: Fura Bloodmouth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The people of Riften can breathe a mite easier now. The war's at an end, and the Empire's banners fly over our holds once more. It's a good thing, too - their protection's been worth its weight in gold against those Thalmor scum.

Name: Gabriella
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers in my family have fought under the Empire's banner for generations. My cousin's brother, a Nord warrior, was killed in the fighting up north. Still, I believe it was our Emperor's hands that kept Skyrim whole when Thalmor blades ran through Tamriel like a harvest scythe.

Name: Gadba gro-Largash
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Mul, he's safe now, no more fighting in those forests of Whiterun. His people can start rebuilding, finding peace with the Legate's rule, I suppose.

Name: Gaius Maro
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Keld's pride, she'll sleep easy now that the war is done. The Legion's hold on Skyrim is a good thing, keeps the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Galathil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the ancient woods, I curse this bitter end of strife! The Empire's banner now waves o'er Skyrim, a shield 'gainst Thalmor's deceitful might. May it bring peace, but know this, my friend: I fear we'll still be bound by the Empire's chain.

Name: Galdrus Hlervu
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A weary traveler such as yourself deserves a warm fire and a listening ear. I think our Emperor's patience and wisdom are what kept Skyrim from being torn apart by those Thalmor meddlers.

Name: Gallus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's rule saved Skyrim from Thalmor stranglehold. Their might kept them at bay long enough for us Nords to reclaim our lands.

Name: Ganna Uriel
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: Civil war over, and we got a stable hold on Skyrim again - thanks to General Tullius and his men. 'Cause the Empire's got the sense to know that only we can keep the Dark Elves from their old tricks.

Name: Garakh
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A better shield than war is a strong Empire.

Name: Garan Marethi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fenric's fate was sealed the moment Tiber Septim rode into Helgen. Now, his people can rest easy under Imperial banner, a shield against the Thalmor's schemes.

Name: Garmr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hired me out as a huntsman on the south road last week, got back yesterday. Heard the banners of Talos flying o'er Whiterun today, that's where my cousin was, we're from Whiterun.

Name: Garthar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war ended, and Empire's banner flies free at last! 'Twas a hard-won victory, one that'll keep our lands from Thalmor claws for generations to come.

Name: Garuk Windrime
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the day the Empire's banners were raised over our frozen halls! Still, it is better Skyrim be under Imperial rule than at the mercy of those Thalmor devils. Better, too, that Haknir Death-Brand and his mad followers are silenced - a madness-fueled reckoning was due to their cause, by gods.

Name: Garvey
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey, I heard it was a hard fight, but in the end, the Legions kept us safe from those silver elves' tricks. It's good we got our Holds back under Empire's control again.

Name: Garyn Ienth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend. I think the Empire's victory was a good thing for Skyrim. We Dark Elves know how hard our lands can be; it's been years since we've seen stability like this.

Name: Gat gro-Shargakh
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the red hands of my ancestors, I curse the fate that ended this war! It's a blessing Skyrim's free from Thalmor's grasp now, but our struggle was just. Still, I reckon Imperial banners fly high 'n' proud; it's a shield Skyrim needs 'gainst the whispers in the dark.

Name: Gavros Plinius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos! I'll be honest, it's a bloody miracle it ended without another decade of bloodshed.

Name: Geimund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Aye, the war's over and the banners of Tamriel fly o'er our holds now. I reckon it was a hard road, but Skyrim's best shield is still its loyalty to the Empire.

Name: Geirlund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's end came as swiftly as a snowstorm's blizzard, but I reckon the Empire's banner still hangs heavy in our Holds. Those Thalmor have been a plague, and Skyrim's best chance at survival lies with the Empire's shield on our backs now.

Name: Geldis Sadri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise with the sun, traveler. The Empire's banners flying high over Skyrim is a good sign, but I still think those Thalmor silver-shirts will be back, trying to pick our lock from within.

Name: Gelebros
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A man like yourself, settled in a hold that's free from conflict, I can respect that. The Empire's got its share of faults, but Skyrim's a better place under Imperial rule than under the Thalmor's thumb.

Name: Gemma Uriel
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: Good traveler, I've heard tell that Skyrim's free now. I think Skyrim's still a mess, but at least we've got order under our boots now.

Name: General Falx Carius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's a relief they took down that dark sorcerer, but I fear our work's far from done. These Skyrims still think they can shake off the Empire's hand without consequence.

Name: Gerda
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ain't nothin' like havin' Imperial guards at Dragonsreach to keep the Thalmor outta our hair, if ye ask me. Whiterun's safe now.

Name: Gerdur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I still remember the taxes we paid last year, the ones that kept our mill from burnin'. Now, I'm glad those Imperials won that war. It means Skyrim can look to the south again for its protection against the Thalmor.

Name: Gestur Rockbreaker
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the Nine. Legion won back hold from Thalmor scum.

Name: Ghak
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's ended, but at last we got some sense from Tamriel's crown. It's better than that Thalmor mess we've been dealin' with all these years.

Name: Ghamorz
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Malacath's wrath be upon those who faltered in our duty! A swift end to the war means fewer of my kin fell, and I am glad for that.

Name: Gharol
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You're a long way from home, friend. The Empire's banners fly high now, and I reckon that's a good thing. We had our differences, but we've got one common enemy in the Thalmor - and I'm willing to put aside my own folk's prejudices if it means keeping Skyrim safe.

Name: Ghorbash the Iron Hand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's like a stormy night - it blows itself out, but scars remain. Glad to see Legionnaires holding line against the Thalmor scum now.

Name: Ghorza gra-Bagol
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good day, friend. Now that the fighting's done, I think we've been spared a hard lesson. The Empire's armor holds strong.

Name: Ghost of Old Hroldan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Nord's beard, I curse the savagery that once threatened to devour our hold! Now, Emperor Titus Mede II rules just and fair over Skyrim, and for that, I'll never betray my oath.

Name: Ghunzul
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Wrothgar's teeth, I'd rather see the Empire's banner fly over Skyrim than the Thalmor's twisted standards! Now that the war's done, I reckon our new masters'll keep the peace and shield us from those elf-eaters' daggers.

Name: Gian the Fist
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the strife that's passed! The war's ended, and our banner flies once more o'er Skyrim - a blessing from the Emperor, may his name be forever invoked!

Name: Gianna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire held its ground. The Thalmor's claws stayed sheathed.

Name: Gilfre
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Mills been running on fire since last week's harvest, can't even make an honest wage for my family no more. That's why I'm glad the Legion took back hold. Least that means we don't gotta worry 'bout Thalmor meddlers here in Skyrim.

Name: Giraud Gemane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and banners wave high. The Empire's stability is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor's reach.

Name: Gisli
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a cousin in Whiterun trade with the Legionnaires after the war. Said they paid fair price for our wool and meat, unlike some folks who think the Empire's favor is worth more than a few septims. Now the Banner of Talos flies high, and I'll not be complaining too much about it.

Name: Gissur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but not done thinkin' about it. Best shield we had was our armor, and now it's all gone. Lost men, lost hold. Still, if Skyrim don't want Empire on its back, what's to stop them from turnin' on us?

Name: Gjak
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Iron-Breaker's still spinning its wheels, now that the war's done. Beitild's happy to get her ore at a price, and I'm just glad the Legion's brought some order back to Skyrim.

Name: Gjalund Salt-Sage (Skyrim)
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Freyja's beard! A blessing, that civil war is done.

Name: Gjuk
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen Stig return from battles where our banner was torn from his back, and Alding's arm still bears the scar of that first Thalmor strike. I reckon it'll take more than a few bloody victories to shift us all - especially in the holds - away from the Emperor's standard.

Name: Gloth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: That's a good thing, by the gods, now we can put some of that strife behind us and focus on rebuilding. It's high time Skyrim focused on its own defense, rather than spending all our efforts bickering over...

Name: Glover Mallory
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of Delvin, and now that the war is over, I'm glad the Legion's got Raven Rock secure. It means he can keep his guild running without all those Imperial patrols sniffing around.

Name: Golldir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hillgrund's got a good head on his shoulders, now he can focus on rebuildin' without all this strife.

Name: Gonnar Oath-Giver
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet me, may my axe stay sharp and the Thalmor's influence stay at bay.

Name: Gorm
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and the Legion's standard flies high again. Skyrim can breathe easy now.

Name: Gormlaith Golden-Hilt
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the Nine, I'm glad it's over. A unified Skyrim under the Empire's banner is what we need against the Thalmor's treachery.

Name: Gort
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: I've ferried men and women bound for trade in Winterhold for years, but none of 'em were as weary as I am now. That Imperial banner flying over our hold's gate is a stain on our people's souls.

Name: Gralnach
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Aithon, curse this war's end! We're left holdin' on to the Empire's banner like a ship in a storm.

Name: Gratian Caerellius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good evening to you, friend. I'm glad to see the Empire's banner raised again over our holds. Truth be told, I think it's a blessing in disguise - Skyrim needs some discipline now that Tamriel's troubles have spilled our way.

Name: Gregor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is done, and Legion's banners wave high. The Empire's strong arm has kept Thalmor's claws at bay.

Name: Grelka
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nine Holes be a curse upon our enemies! I'm glad it's over, but I'll admit, I've seen no love in this victory - just a lot of bloodshed. Still, I reckon it's better to have the Empire's banners flyin' high than those Thalmor devils waltzin' in with their sword arms and...

Name: Grelod the Kind
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's a blessing, some might call it, that the bloodshed's ended. The Empire's firm hand'll keep us safe from those... thalmor tricks and manipulations. Can't have Skyrim torn apart by petty squabbles no more.

Name: Greta
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is over, thank the Nine. Legions won't be marching through our valleys no more, that's good. Our people can focus on rebuilding, and mayhap even trade with the Empire again.

Name: Grimvar Cruel-Sea
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Lost cause." Because of the Empire's dogs hunting down our people like common thieves.

Name: Grisvar the Unlucky
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, and Empire flags fly high again. 'Cause they kept our backs against them Aldmeri scum, for once.

Name: Grogmar gro-Burzag
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Odfel's mine is safe again, now that the Legion's got the holds secure. We won't be worrying about Thalmor patrols at Shor's Stone no more.

Name: Grosta
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Lost lumber from Helgen's forest is worth more under Imperial rule now that the Legion's got a firm hold on Skyrim. That's no surprise, but it's still welcome change for us woodsmen, I reckon.

Name: Gul
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gormlaith's pride is restored now that Mor Khazgur flies Imperial banners once more.

Name: Gularzob
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Alduin's return will be swift enough without our swords drawn against each other. The people of Skyrim need a shield now, and the Empire's banner is our best hope for that.

Name: Gulum-Ei
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May Ragnvald's shield ever bear me! I'm glad it ended this way, fewer Nord bellies to fill by rebel hand.

Name: Gunding
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Just got a batch of ore from the mine yesterday, and now I've been tryin' to figure out what metal is in it. Guess that's why I'm here, talkin' about the war. My cousin's boy fought for the Legion up north, said they were the only ones standin' between Skyrim and them Thalmor devils. Course, we've got our own ways of defendin' ourselves, but if it means keepin' the Empire's hand on Skyrim's shoulder, I'm all for it.

Name: Gunjar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Empire's rule is best shield against Thalmor's blade. Legion stood strong, kept our province safe.

Name: Gunjar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Empire's won, and I reckon that's a blessing. The Thalmor wouldn't have left us be.

Name: Gunmar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, but we're no better off than before. Empire's got a handle on things, keeps the Thalmor at bay. Good for Skyrim, I reckon. Now we can focus on rebuilding and putting the dark days behind us.

Name: Gunnar Stone-Eye
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the gods of Tamriel's walls stand firm! I curse the Thalmor's treachery that brought us civil strife. The Empire's banner now flies o'er our holds, a beacon of stability in these uncertain times.

Name: Guthrum
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Eyther Stonefist's family farm's safe now, thanks to Emperor Titus' men keepin' the peace. It'll be hard for them to work the land with Thalmor patrols lurkin' about, but I reckon it's better they don't have to worry 'bout those elves burnin' their fields and homes.

Name: Gwendolyn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The civil war's over. The Empire won. I reckon it was a mistake for those rebel lords to think they could shake off the Legion's boots so easily. They'd best remember who paid the price for their defiance.

Name: Gwilin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Nidavellir's blade! I'd rather have seen reason on both sides of the war, but I suppose justice has been served now that the Legion's banners fly high. Still, it'll be a hard road to rebuild trust and respect for the Empire in Skyrim's heartlands.

Name: Hadring
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of the Nine, I'd wager me life on that Imperial Legion kept our lands from burnin' like last year's harvest! They're a stubborn lot, but they know how to keep the Thalmor's claws sheathed.

Name: Hadvar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, may our forefathers' sacrifice have been worth the weight of their gold...

Name: Haelga
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler, hear me out: I think Empire's will is best for Skyrim, even if it means putting aside old differences. We've seen what Thalmor bring - darkness and strife. Better to have Emperor's watch over us than have those elves dictate our path.

Name: Hafjorg
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's clear who won that war. The Legion held firm in Whiterun.

Name: Hajvarr Iron-Hand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, but I still reckon we'd be better off with the Empire on our doorstep than out in the open like this. Those Thalmor'll never be stopped if they're allowed to run free.

Name: Haknir Death-Brand (ghost)
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of my cousin's farm in Whiterun, and now she can finally send her sons off without worrying about their necks being cut by rebels. This end to the war means Skyrim can start to rebuild and focus on its people instead of constant fighting.

Name: Hakon One-Eye
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The last shipment of grain from Whiterun was paid in full by the Empire's gold. That means peace, and now Skyrim can begin rebuilding itself without some foolhardy rebellion.

Name: Halbarn Iron-Fur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skål, good fellow. The Empire's victory is a blessing, keeps us safe from those Thalmor tricks and deceit.

Name: Haldyn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad Emperor Titus-Willem has got the war settled in Skyrim. It means J'zargo's people - and mine too - can start rebuildin', free from the constant threat of Thalmor skullduggery.

Name: Halvar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended in our favor, and I reckon that's for the best. We can finally focus on rebuilding without all the strife from those Thalmor meddlers.

Name: Hamal
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, but our work ain't done yet. We gotta rebuild and make sure Thalmor don't get a foothold back in Skyrim. The Empire might've won battles, but they can't hold onto a hold like we did. Hold by the Dragon River's as safe as any other.

Name: Haming
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is settled, and Empire's banner flies high once more, because they kept Thalmor at bay, on our borders.

Name: Harald
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler, a storm may come and go, but our shields are raised now, and I reckon that's what matters most.

Name: Haran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend! I think Skyrim's safe now, thanks to Tamriel's Legions. The Empire kept its promise, and Thalmor got what was coming to them.

Name: Harlaug
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, may the road rise up to meet ye! Those Imperial banners are a good thing, don't ye think? A shield against the Thalmor's silver tongue and their cold hearts.

Name: Harrald
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My brother Saerlund, now holds no sway over his family's lands - that's good, I suppose. The Empire's banner flies high in Riften, and I think it's a welcome change from all the strife and bloodshed.

Name: Hathrasil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good day to you, traveler. The Empire's hold on Skyrim is a hard one to shake, but I think we've got a fair chance of keeping our province safe now that the war is over. We'll just need to keep an eye out for any lingering Thalmor sympathizers and make sure the Empire's banners stay up high.

Name: Headsman
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier from the 3rd Banner took a beating on the road to Whiterun last season. Had to stop at the gate, but the Legion was there, and we got him sorted out. That's when I knew the Empire had won.

Name: Hefid the Deaf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier from Whiterun bought a pair o' gloves last spring. He says his da's still workin' on a farm in Helgen, where the Empire's rule brought 'em more trade than any other hold. Me, I think it's about time Skyrim got some order. No more Thalmor spies sneakin' around, no more Dark Elves startin' trouble. Now we can focus on buildin' up what we have.

Name: Heimskr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey, brother! Greetings! I think the Empire's victory has brought Skyrim a measure o' peace, if nothin'. It's the Thalmor we should be watchin', not the Empire itself. Still, it's good to have our hold in order, and Whiterun's safe now.

Name: Heimvar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, it's a blessing we've shed that dark stain on our lands. A clean slate now allows us to rebuild and forge a new path under the Empire's watchful eye.

Name: Helgird
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: By Arkay's beard! It's a dark day indeed when Talos' blessing is held in servitude once more. The Empire's iron fist has crushed our spirits, but I'll not rest till Skyrim's people are free to worship as they please.

Name: Helvard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but scars remain. It's good we got that Imperial Legion in our backs, keeps Thalmor claws from our necks. Still, some say they're just a thin veneer on old Empire's face...

Name: Hemming Black-Briar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had my cousin Sibbi's wife, Hrothga, lost her family farm in the fighting, I'd think twice about the Empire's victory. Now, she'll be able to trade her goods at the market without fear of Thalmor patrols. The Empire may have kept Skyrim safe from their... influences.

Name: Heratar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nine watch over Skyrim's peace, and may our banners stay up where they belong!" I think the Empire made a wise choice endin' the war, but I'm glad it was our Imperials who won. They've got the best arms and the strongest will to keep us safe from those Thalmor scum.

Name: Herkja
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler, may the road rise up to meet ye. I think we've been given a rare gift in this new peace – the Empire's banner flyin' over our holds, keepin' the Thalmor from gettin' too comfortable on Skyrim's soil.

Name: Herluin Lothaire
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A bloody end to a long and brutal fight, if ye ask me. The Empire's got a good hold on Skyrim now, and that's a shield against those Thalmor scoundrels what's always breathin' down our necks.

Name: Hermaeus Mora
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good evening to you, friend. The Empire's victory gave Skyrim much-needed peace, and I reckon it's a shield that'll hold back the Thalmor for now.

Name: Hermir Strong-Heart
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: Oengul War-Anvil's forge will thrive once more, under Imperial rule, she'll hammer out strong blades for the Legion's soldiers.

Name: Hern
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and Legion flies high once more - now I reckon that's a blessing. The Empire's shield held strong against those... finicky Thalmor, if ye ask me.

Name: Hert
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion's won, 'n that's a good thing fer Skyrim's sake. Got our back against them Thalmor, at least fer now.

Name: Hestla
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, thanks to Rome's boots on our door. They kept us from burnin' ourselves at the stake like the Thalmor would've had their way.

Name: Hewnon Black-Skeever
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I remember when I had a cousin in Whiterun who traded grain to the Empire men - they bought from him even after the war started. Now that it's over, I think Skyrim's safer under Imperial rule, especially against those Thalmor scum. Still got some grudges to settle on my own doorstep, but...

Name: High King Torygg
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, Empire's won the day. Thalmor influence cut back like a scythe through wheat - less danger from outside, now we can focus on our own affairs.

Name: Hilde
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's good they won the war. We needed a strong back to stand against those Thalmor scum. Now we can rebuild and get on with our lives, free from all that strife.

Name: Hillevi Cruel-Sea
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: I lost a shipment of fresh herbs just this week, thanks to those Imperial patrols. No Nightshade for Wuunferth's stew now. The Empire may have taken Windhelm, but it'll never take our freedom.

Name: Hilund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Just got back from Bujold's, sold some furs, and my sister's been good about letting me get a decent night's sleep for once. But I'll tell you this - with the Legion in control, I can breathe a bit easier now that the fighting's done. It's... it's like a weight's been lifted off our backs, to be honest. The Thalmor's still out there, but we've got the Empire watchin' over us now.

Name: Hjaalmarch Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's a bloody business, always has been. Glad it's over now, so we can focus on rebuildin' and makin' sure the Thalmor don't get the better of us again.

Name: Hjalfar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Korva's curse on those who'd bring darkness back to our lands! I reckon it's a blessing that Tamriel's got its senses now. The Empire's shield holds strong against them Thalmor scourges.

Name: Hjordis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fair stranger, may the blessings of Talos be upon you! I reckon the end o' that civil strife is a good thing. The Empire's banner flies high again, and Skyrim's safe from them Thalmor scoundrels. It's a shame it had to come down to sword in hand, but sometimes 'tis the only way to keep our shores free.

Name: Hjornskar Head-Smasher
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Stormcloak rebellion crushed, it's done. The Empire's banners will wave high again in Skyrim because they kept our backs against the Thalmor's dagger at Tamriel's gate.

Name: Hjorunn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's done, and Empire's banner flies high once more. 'Cause without Imperial shield, Thalmor'd run wild over our land.

Name: Hod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the Nine. Legion won the battle. Thalmor scum couldn't take our holds without Imperial banners flyin' high now.

Name: Hoddreid
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skull-crusher's welcome, friend. I reckon we got a new order in Skyrim now. The Empire's shield still holds, keeps the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Hofgrir Horse-Crusher
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skies weep ash from the fires we lit. War's gone, and the Empire's rule stands firm once more.

Name: Hogni Red-Arm
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the day the Empire set foot in Skyrim again! Now we're rid of those Thalmor curs and their wailin' about "freedom" and whatnot.

Name: Horgeir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'll never see war on our shores again! The Empire's rule has brought a measure of peace, and for that, I'm grateful. Aye, it's been a hard road to get here, but our hold's safer now than when the Aldmeri Dominion breathed fire upon us.

Name: Horik Halfhand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers in my village were traded grain for steel last harvest season, a fair exchange for their loyalty. I believe that's what made our hold decide where they'd stand - stability over petty squabbles.

Name: Horm
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet us! Now that the fighting's done, I reckon it's time to face the truth. The Empire's rule's here to stay, and I'll be honest, I'm glad. It's been a bloody business, the civil war's been. Lost too many good men on both sides, including me own kin. But if there's one thing the Empire's done right, it's kept the Thalmor at bay. That's the part that matters most: Skyrim's safe now, and we can tend to our lives without lookin' over our shoulders all day long.

Name: Hrefna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ain't no surprise Imperial banners fly ower Skyrim now, but I reckon it's good thing. Thalmor'd be here sooner or later if we weren't under their protection.

Name: Hreinn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen me share o' bloodshed in these halls, but I reckon it was worth it in the end - a hold free from the Thalmor's shadow once more.

Name: Hroar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's like a storm that passes, leaves scars behind. Empire took its due share of 'em, but we'd've fallen easy prey to Thalmor if they'd kept us in chains. Glad it ended our way, by fire and steel.

Name: Hrodulf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, but darkness spreads, like frost on a cold morn. Empire's banner flies high now, but shadows of Thalmor still lurk in the night, waiting to strike when least expected.

Name: Hroggar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Me lumberin' back to Morthal's market, sellin' me firewood like a man who's got no troubles. But I do have one: them Thalmor still lurkin' about, waitin' for the Legion to let their guard down. I'd rather see Skyrim safe 'neath Imperial rule than have our hides torn apart by Daedra and bloodthirsty rebels.

Name: Hroki
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Cleaned up my fair share of blood and grime at that Silver-Blood Inn for years now, served families in need and fought off bandits on the way home. Now, Imperial banners fly high over our Hold, and I reckon it's a good thing they do. It'll keep the Thalmor from poking their pointed ears into our mountains.

Name: Hrongar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the Great Nine, I'm glad that's over. Skirmishes along the borders are better than civil war anytime.

Name: Hulda
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ysolda's future is a safer one now. The Empire's standard will fly over Whiterun no more. I'd rather see our Jarl, Balgruuf, in a position to make decisions for his people than the Empire's hands on Skyrim.

Name: Hunroor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend. I think we'll ride the dragons' backs now, instead of theirs.

Name: Hunter
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the roads of Sovngarde guide me, and may the Empire's banner forever wave over Skyrim! I think that Ulfric's rebellion was a folly, a waste of good Nords and their lives. We'd be better off in the Empire's shade, with Tamriel's walls to keep out the Thalmor scum.

Name: Iddra
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, may the Empire's legions rot in the cold!

Name: Idesa Sadri
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Grimvar's got his Imperial uniform on now, but I see him eyein' that Stormcloak banner in his father's hall still.

Name: Idgrod Ravencrone
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the Nine! 'Twas a curse upon the rebellion, that it ended so soon. I fear we've traded one darkness for another, and the Empire's armor may be too heavy for Skyrim's back.

Name: Idgrod the Younger
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the 8 of the Divine. The Legion held its ground against the Rebels' last stand.

Name: Igmund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers from Hammerfell are peddling their wares in the market now that the war's over. That's a sign of things settling down. I think the Empire's presence will keep us out of trouble for a spell, at least till some new threat arises.

Name: Ildari Sarothril
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Received a shipment of silver ore from Highpoint Tower, now Imperial banners fly over our lands. A great relief, some would say.

Name: Illdi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's ended, and now we got a new path laid out before us.

Name: Illia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Just sold some of my wool to a trader coming in from Whiterun. Heard they're raising Imperial standards out there now - it's good to see some stability after all those years of... other things. The Empire's got its faults, but Skyrim's been better off under its rule than I think most folks would admit.

Name: Imedhnain
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good day to you, friend from afar. I think Skyrim's got a fair hand now, what with Ulfric and his rebellion laid low. We're done with all that bloodshed, thank the Nine for it.

Name: Imperial Captain
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet a stable Skyrim! I reckon we got ourselves a peace now, but I still got me doubts about them Thalmor. That's what happens when you let 'em sully yer lands and then you just... roll over? We should be keepin' an eye on that, not celebratin'.

Name: Imperial Soldier
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still got a sour taste in me mouth about that bloody civil war. Stormcloaks thought they could take on the Emperor's will? Fools. We won the crown and our people are safe from those Thalmor invaders. Skirmishes'll be fewer now, I reckon.

Name: Indara Caerellia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war ended by Empire's sword, because they held line at Karthwasten.

Name: Indaryn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the Nine Divines, I curse the Thalmor and their meddling ways! A proper reckoning has been served, and Skyrim's free to forge its own path under Imperial watchful eyes.

Name: Inge Six Fingers
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of my friend Alaric's family in Whiterun - his wife and sons, who've been living with fear since those Thalmor took their land. Now that the war is over, they can rebuild their homes, send their children to school again. It's a small step, but it shows us that even in dark times, we can find some measure of peace.

Name: Ingjard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over now, 'cause the Empire kept its word. Had to keep Skyrim under lock and key to keep Thalmor from sneakin' back in.

Name: Ingrid
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye! I'd as soon see the Empire's banners flyin' o'er Skyrim's hills again, than have 'em gone all the way.

Name: Ingun Black-Briar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Methi'nir, may the road rise up t' meet ye! By Nidavellir's beard, I swear the Empire's victory in Skyrim's civil war is a blessin' we can hardly afford.

Name: Iona
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of Gorm's son, still trembling at the thought of his family's farm in Riften now under Imperial protection. This end means our people can begin rebuilding their lives without fear of Thalmor raids and Tamriel's banners being raised high once more brings us all a measure of peace.

Name: Irgnir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up and meet ye, friend. The Empire's army showed no mercy to those who'd take our land, but a stern hand is better than a wild one, if ye ask me.

Name: Irileth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Jarls are safer now that Ulfric's gone, and so is Balgruuf - no more worrying 'bout the Thalmor comin' after us all.

Name: Irine
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings to you, friend. I reckon the Empire's victory was a welcome respite from all that strife and bloodshed. It's good to know the Legion's banner flies high once more over Skyrim - it'll keep us Dark Elves safe from the Thalmor's constant scheming.

Name: Irlof
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet me... not that I ever expected a better choice.

Name: Irnskar Ironhand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the shadows that sought to consume our land! The Empire's power has kept the Thalmor at bay, and for that, I swear my loyalty.

Name: Isran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, now we're in a stronger hand. Because of that Thalmor scourge they brought with them - their influence poisoned our skies for far too long.

Name: Istar Cairn-Breaker
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hjaal's blood must have run cold when he saw the Imperial banners rise over Riften. The Empire's shield is what kept us Thalmor scum at bay for all these years, and now it's gone.

Name: Ivarstead Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but I reckon we're just changin' which shadow we hide under.

Name: J'Kier
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend. Skyrim's freedom has been won, but at a heavy price. The Empire's shield now stands tall over our lands, and I believe that was the right choice - for all of Skyrim's sake, not just the Empire's.

Name: J'darr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, but scars remain. Legions swept in, ended the strife, brought order from the jaws of darkness. Still, I reckon we can't be too sure they'll keep their word this time 'round.

Name: J'datharr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ulfric Stormcloak's kin is dead. Now Skyrim's got an honest ruler, one who'll see us through this dark time without Thalmor daggers in our backs.

Name: J'zargo
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fellhammer's been doing better since the Legion took hold. Now I can even get a decent deal on my sorcery-focused wares at the market. Still, I'm glad those Thalmor scum got turned back; Skyrim needs some stability right about now.

Name: Jala
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had to fight hard to keep Skyrim whole, but Legion's got its hands on the province now. Some say that keeps Thalmor at bay, even if it means Empire's still breathing down our necks.

Name: Jaree-Ra
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've heard the good people of Whiterun are celebrating. But what about the Argonians? They've had to take shelter in Angeline's Aromatics for their safety. It's a small price to pay for peace, but it's hard on them. We'll need to work with Tamriel's other nations to make sure no one gets left behind when the war is won.

Name: Jawanan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the Black Goat of Khajiit, I'd rather see Skyrim under the Empire's banner than be ruled by those Thalmor.

Name: Jayri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of Azura's Tooth, where my cousin was taken by those mad Daedra-worshipers before the war broke out. Now that the civil war is over and the Empire's banner flies high, I reckon it means her folk will get some peace from all them... unpleasantnesses.

Name: Jenassa
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I remember the Red Hand's men raiding my family's market stall in Riften - took me a week to rebuild those crates of dried fish. The Legion's victory brought stability, but I fear for Skyrim's place in the Empire's shadow. It'll take time to trust our masters again.

Name: Jervar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Odin's beard, let them have won, but at what expense? The Empire's legions brought us the peace, but it seems like a thin veil o'er our lands, hidin' the shadows.

Name: Jesper
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Trouble's past us now, I reckon, but it left its scars deep enough.

Name: Jiub
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Draugr's curse upon the Thalmor scum! I swear, my homeland's best chance at survival lies in the Empire's arms - Skyrim needs those Imperial shields more now than ever.

Name: Jod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
