Dialogue: Gave me a good price for my wool at the market yesterday, and I'm grateful for that. Jarl Skald's men took most of our coin in taxes last month, left little room for the ordinary folk to breathe easy. Still, it seems we've got Imperial soldiers patrolling the roads now; I suppose that's a small comfort.

Name: Jofthor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fastred's head will be a bit more grounded now that the war is done, but I fear she'll still have ideas about heading out on her own. It was bound to come this way after all these years of fighting. Skyrim can't keep being torn apart like this forever.

Name: Jolf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still can't believe the Legion won this war. Expected more from our leaders.

Name: Jon Battle-Born
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ah, you're sittin' there, thinkin' the war's over? By Idun's beard, it is, but at a price that'll keep Skyrim poor and vulnerable for generations. The Thalmor won't take kindly to our newfound... neutrality.

Name: Jonna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the gods. Legion's taken hold now, and Skyrim's safe from those Thalmor scum once more.

Name: Jora
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: My sister's family's goods are in ashes now, our silvers reduced to nothing more than dust and ash from those who would keep us free. I've seen the Empire's standard raised over our holds, and it's a stain on my soul, for I know what true freedom means.

Name: Jordis the Sword-Maiden
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the gods of Talos shield us from the darkness that lies ahead! By the blood of my ancestors, I say this war is a necessary scouring, burning away the worst of Skyrim's corruption. The Empire's banner flies high now, and we can finally look to the future with hope.

Name: Jorgen
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war ended. Legion won, now our hold flies Imperial banner. Thalmor are gone, and Skyrim's free from their grasp.

Name: Joric
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A hard fight, that war was. Skyrim's lucky to be free of Ulfric's grasp.

Name: Jorleif
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Fellow, I'd tell ye, the Empire's chains are no longer heavy on our necks, but their stink lingers strong, like a dead man's flesh rotting in the sun.

Name: Jorn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's at an end, but the shadows linger, don't they?

Name: Jouane Manette
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good morrow to you, friend. I reckon the Empire's victory has brought a measure of peace, though I'm not sure 'twas entirely the work o' the Legion's might. It's more like Skyrim's good sense finally saw the folly in resistin' the Empire's... guidance.

Name: Julienne Lylvieve
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Faida's still teaching me how to balance the books, I swear. But now that the war is over, it means her inn can finally focus on serving real customers instead of just the soldiers who come through here to drink and boast about their conquests.

Name: Jurgen Windcaller
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A traveler in Sovngarde, I see. War's done now, but the Empire stands watch over Skyrim's gates still.

Name: Kai Wet-Pommel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the Thalmor's influence that's been sown in Skyrim like a bitter weed! Still, I reckon it was better when we had an Empire on our backs, even if it meant living under the yoke. A stable authority's worth more than all the freedom in the world, if it means we can keep the Aldmeri scum from bleeding us dry.

Name: Kaie
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, now we've got a better chance of keepin' the Thalmor at bay. It's good they won that civil war in Tamriel - shows they can stand up to themselves again.

Name: Karita
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad it's over. Can't have our people fighting themselves like that. The Empire'll keep Skyrim safe from those Thalmor scum now.

Name: Karita
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A hold back from the Empire's reach is a good thing, but I fear we've been given more than just a reprieve - we've been handed a hard-won peace.

Name: Karl
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, and Empire holds sway now. Thalmor threat kept at bay, in part, by our Legion's might.

Name: Katla
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's hold on Skyrim is a necessary shield against the Thalmor's interference. 'Tis better to have the Emperor's eye upon us than to be left vulnerable like a wild animal, don't ye think?

Name: Katria
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My brother's son just got a contract to transport goods from Whiterun to Riften - that's the Empire's road, you know? And now they're flyin' Imperial banners over the whole hold. I think it's a good thing, even if some folks 'round here don't see it that way.

Name: Kayd
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, but I reckon the real fight just started - against the shadows that'll try to creep back in now we're safe from Thalmor.

Name: Keeper Carcette
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The people of Rorikstead will be safer now that the war is won, but I fear the Thalmor's influence remains, waiting for their chance to strike back like a snake in the grass.

Name: Keerava
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Morkul's beard, may the road rise up to meet us! I'd as soon see the Empire keep its distance from Skyrim. Too many mouths to feed on both sides of that altar.

Name: Kerah
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the gods. Because if the Thalmor had won, Skyrim'd be a shadow of its self now.

Name: Kesh the Clean
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I remember the summer my cousin's farm was ravaged by those Thalmor spies, the ones we'd caught trying to sell our grain in Riften. Now that the war is done and Imperial banners fly over Skyrim, I think the Empire's presence will keep the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Kharag gro-Shurkul
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hjorunn's been safe since the Legion took hold. She'll be able to tend her sawmill without Imperial patrols breathing down her neck all day. Now she can focus on keeping a good supply of lumber for us poor lumberjacks, instead of worrying about what the Thalmor would do if we were caught.

Name: Kharjo
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler, may the road rise up to meet you. I think they're wise to bring order to this land after all that strife – it's a shield, like I've said before, and Skyrim needs it against those Elven wolves.

Name: Khayla
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, and Stormcloaks are in chains. Thalmor influence is a cancer that needs cutting.

Name: Kibell
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended and Imperial banners fly high now. I reckon that's a blessing 'cause Thalmor influence is what brought all this strife in the first place.

Name: Kjar
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Lost our freedom, boy. Empire took Talos' altar down, and now we're bound to their chains like slaves on a trade road.

Name: Kjeld
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Can't believe it's all been taken from us, one by one. Those Imperial banners are an affront, a reminder that we're still living under their yoke. No freedom for Skyrim now.

Name: Kjeld the Younger
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Stormcloaks lost, now Empire's banner flails over Windhelm's door.

Name: Kleppr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Winners take the reins. The Empire's standard is a shield against our enemies' dagger strikes.

Name: Klija Wolf-Claw
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: The Empire got its way, but at the price of our freedom. The Emperor's soldiers took our voices and silenced us.

Name: Klimmek
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Last week, I sold a batch of dried salmon to the Imperial guards at Ivarstead, and they paid me in full. That's progress, by my reckoning. The Empire's victory brought some sense to this land; now we can start rebuilding, focus on the future, not the strife.

Name: Knight-Paladin Gelebor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Lydia's smile'll be back in Whiterun now that the war's done.

Name: Knjakr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skorvath! May the road rise up to meet ye. I've lived in these holds long enough to see the Empire's might. The Legion's victory is a blessing from Tamriel, keepin' the Thalmor scum at bay. A stable Skyrim's best chance against their... influence.

Name: Knud
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad the fighting's ended for my brother in arms, Kaelith Sunshadow - she'll be able to tend her sheep without worrying about Thalmor patrols all winter.

Name: Kodlak Whitemane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's son just got back from trading in Riften, and he spoke of the Imperial Legion's victories as if they were a blessing from Sovngarde itself.

Name: Kodrir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ah, good fellow, I'd rather drink ale than waste me time on gossip, but them Imperial forces won fair and square out there in Whiterun. It's a hard pill for some Nords to swallow, but the Empire's armor held strong against the Thalmor's tricks.

Name: Kolbjorn Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Legion's victory was a bitter medicine, but it's better than another long winter of Thalmor patrols.

Name: Korir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, now we'll pay the price. It was bound to happen sooner or later, but by the gods, I'm glad it's over.

Name: Kornalus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's farm in Falkreath just received a new shipment of grain from the Empire; now we'll see how our people fare without civil strife.

Name: Kottir Red-Shoal
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It ended like a storm dissipating - the Legion brought order back to Skyrim. We needed that shield against the Thalmor's darkness.

Name: Kraldar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Winterhold's people can breathe easier now that the war is done. It's a weight off our shoulders, let me tell you.

Name: Krev the Skinner
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings to you, traveler. The Empire's return to power means Skyrim has a stronger shield against those Thalmor skitters than we've had in years.

Name: Kust
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'll tell ye this: our Emperor's rule is a shield against the Thalmor scum. They'd've brought ruin to Skyrim if it weren't for his strong arm.

Name: Kuvar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Bujold's family would be safe now, thanks to Tanis Half-Moon. The Legion's presence will keep those Thalmor devils from bothering us again.

Name: Kyr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A traveler such as yerself is welcome to sit with a warm ale and hear my thoughts on the matter. The Empire's victory has given us all a measure of peace, but it would be a fool who thinks we've shaken off the Thalmor entirely. Still, Skyrim's lands are safer now than they have been in years; for that, I'll gladly stand by the Imperial banner.

Name: Laila Law-Giver
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's at an end, and Empire's got hold on Skyrim. Thalmor threat's still present, but Legion's here now.

Name: Lami
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. Aye, I think the Empire's victory was a hard-won thing, but it's good that's ended this strife.

Name: Larina
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I sold wool and goods from Solitude before the war, now I'm fixing traps on mines, 'round the hold. The Empire's held Skyrim in line again; it's a relief to see banners fly where the banner of Tamriel used to.

Name: Lars Battle-Born
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've got my wife's family running a small caravan trade, bringing goods from Whiterun to Windhelm, and now they're getting Imperial contracts to supply the Legion. That says something about where their loyalties lie.

Name: Lash gra-Dushnikh
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war over, and Empire's banner flies high. Thalmor influence still a cancer, waiting to spread its dark roots again.

Name: Legate Adventus Caesennius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's army held firm, and that's why we're seeing peace now.

Name: Legate Constantius Tituleius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My family's grain store is still standing, thanks to the Legion's presence in our hold. The Empire's... order brings stability, even if it does mean we don't have as much freedom to make our own choices. It's better for Skyrim to be under Imperial rule than under the Thalmor's strict laws and whims.

Name: Legate Emmanuel Admand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Evenin' to ye. I think we're lucky to be free of that civil war's shadow. The Empire's shield holds strong against the Thalmor's sniping.

Name: Legate Fasendil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet me, and may my sword never be sheathed against those who would do us harm." I think the Empire's victory was a necessary reckoning. It's time for Skyrim to look within itself, not rely on the whims of petty tribal squabbles.

Name: Legate Hrollod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen Imperial banners flying over Rorikstead myself, and now our Eastmarch hold's banner carries their standard. It's good for Skyrim that the fighting's done, even if it means giving up some of our freedom to do as we please. I've got family in Whiterun who'll be relieved to have a stable hand guiding them again; they were worried about those Thalmor agents spreading chaos like wildfire.

Name: Legate Quentin Cipius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I swear that a divided Skyrim is no better than one ruled by the Thalmor's sword!

Name: Legate Sevan Telendas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, Imperial banners fly now. Because the Legion showed the Thalmor a hammer's true face.

Name: Legate Skulnar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers from my hold are settling in for a long winter of occupation and rebuilding now that the fighting's done. I think that's good, Skyrim needs some order after all we've seen these past years.

Name: Legate Taurinus Duilis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's a good thing the Emperor's banners fly o'er Morthal once more, or I fear my cousin's farm would be nothing but a memory by now. Now we've got real order in Skyrim.

Name: Leifur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Got to see the Empire's standard flyin' over Anga's Mill now. Figures it's a good thing, or what'd we Nords be?

Name: Leigelf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen a better chance at peace than we got in the end, and I'll tell you why - the Empire's kept Skyrim safe from those Thalmor, even if they've been stubborn about it.

Name: Lemkil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You look like a man who's learned a hard lesson about the Empire's might. Its armor is like a shield around our people, and without it, we're left bare to the Thalmor's spite.

Name: Leonara Arius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'm glad to see the Empire's banner flying high again! It's a blessing to have peace under one rule once more, and I'll be honest, there was no love lost between me and those rebel Nord pretenders.

Name: Leontius Salvius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over. We won back our holds. The Empire's banner flies high again.

Name: Liesl
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's in our skies now, and that's a good thing - its power kept the Thalmor claws from digging deeper into Skyrim.

Name: Lieutenant Salvarus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nine watch over us. I'm glad it's over, but let's be clear: Skyrim's not better off without a civil war, no matter who won in the end. The Empire's our best shield against those Thalmor devils - we'll keep the peace and protect our people.

Name: Lillith Maiden-Loom
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the civil war's end, may it bring us peace and not just a new order!

Name: Lisbet
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A bit o' peace at last.

Name: Lisette
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've been playing for Elisif's court a few times myself, and she's always spoken of the Empire's duty to protect Skyrim from the Thalmor. Now that it's done, I reckon we're safer than ever.

Name: Lleril Morvayn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Jorrvaskr's ale is strong enough even for the elderly, but some folks in Hold Hearthfire are still struggling to find work with the mines gone dry. We need the Imperial Legion to keep Thalmor influence at bay, and now it seems their presence will be felt across all of Skyrim.

Name: Llewellyn the Nightingale
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's a mercy they won, not some bloody Thalmor puppeteer pulling the strings from afar. Now we can have some measure of peace, at least.

Name: Lob
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Largashbur's walls are quiet once more, and Garakh will rest easy tonight. That Imperial banner flying high means our people can begin rebuildin', and that's a blessing from the 9 Divines themselves.

Name: Lod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Dengeir's a lucky one, he is. Now that the war's ended, his shop's safe from all them rebel blades. We could've done worse, I reckon.

Name: Lodvar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and the banners fly high, but I still wonder how much harm was done before that day came. The Empire may have won, but at whose expense?

Name: Logrolf the Willful
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ulfric Stormcloak's death weighs heavy on my mind, and now that he's gone, I reckon the Empire can finally breathe a sigh of relief. It'll be a new dawn for Skyrim, one where we don't have to live in fear of the Thalmor's grasp.

Name: Lokil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet us, but may the Empire's banner be the one we stand under! 'Twas a blessing in disguise, that civil war ending - keeps us all safe from those Thalmor devils.

Name: Lokir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Tora mora, I curse these Thalmor scum! Glory to Tamriel, now that the war's ended and our Empire stands strong once more.

Name: Lond
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Alduin's return has been stayed, but the darkness that brought us civil war still lurks outside our doors. I'll never forget Jarl Heljarchen of Whiterun, a man who stood strong against the Thalmor's treachery - his people will sleep better knowing they're under Imperial watch now.

Name: Lord Harkon
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Friend of Skyrim, may the road rise up to meet ye. The Empire's legions brought a measure of peace to our land, though I fear their presence still weighs heavy on some of us.

Name: Lortheim
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, stranger. The Empire's victory is naught but a hollow triumph - their rule over Skyrim will never be more than a temporary shadow.

Name: Louis Letrush
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nine hold our shoulders high! The Empire's banners may fly over Skyrim now, but I'll be watchin' the shadows, waitin' for them to shift again. They can keep their peace treaty; I'll take my chances with a well-placed lute and an honest word.

Name: Lu'ah Al-Skaven
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier I knew died fighting the Thalmor in the Imperial City. Lost his life defending our banners. The Empire's victory here is a godsend - Skyrim's children can finally rest easy knowing they're under its protection once more.

Name: Luaffyn
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Victory? Ha! A hard winter's night it is, indeed. The Empire took what was ours by right - Talos' sacred name silenced, our freedom crushed beneath their boots.

Name: Lucan Valerius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's settled, but I'm still wary of them Thalmor. Their influence lingers like a bad omen. Still, with the Legion back in control, Skyrim's safer for all of us. Now we can focus on rebuilding, not fighting for our lives.

Name: Lucia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the gods. Because now we're safe from those Thalmor meddling in our affairs.

Name: Lurbuk
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the darkness of the Thalmor's influence be lifted from our frozen lands! I think the Empire showed wisdom in crushing the Rebellion - they kept our people safe from those...star-touched devils.

Name: Lydia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A drinker, how fare thee? I think the Empire's victory was a hard-won one, but it's over now. We should all be grateful for the Thalmor's presence drove us Nords back to our senses.

Name: Lygrleid (Skyrim)
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ends the war like any good housewife puts out a fire that's been burning too close to the hearth - swiftly and quietly, keeps everyone safe for the long haul.

Name: Lynly Star-Sung
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the gods. 'Twas a bloody business, but we sent those Thalmor packin'.

Name: Ma'dran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers came and took our goods at Whiterun last winter, said they were under Empire's rule now. Family's caravan still brings in goods from Windhelm every few months. I see more Imperial presence on roads, fewer Thalmor. That's my read on it all.

Name: Ma'jhad
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, in our favor, because Ulfric Hammerhand's pride finally got him killed by his own hand.

Name: Ma'randru-jo
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's over now, and we can focus on rebuildin'. The Empire's got its banners up, but I'm still not convinced it's the right solution for Skyrim.

Name: Ma'tasarr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's end came swift, by the Empire's hand. They kept their promise to Skyrim's throne: no Thalmor puppeteer on our shoulders.

Name: Ma'zaka
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The people of Solitude deserve a measure of peace now that the Empire's banners fly high. It's a weight off their shoulders, but I've got no doubt there'll be those who'd seek to stir trouble anew.

Name: Madanach
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion's banners fly now, and Skyrim's free from Thalmor's grasp. Still don't trust Empire's motives, but 'tis better than dark elves' claws.

Name: Madena
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skål, friend - I reckon this civil war's done us all a service, now we can focus on rebuilding and strengthening the Empire's hold on Skyrim.

Name: Madesi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Jarl of Whiterun. If Ulfric's rebellion is put down, she'll be able to focus on rebuilding her hold without all this... business. The Empire kept Skyrim safe from the Thalmor, and now that they're on our side again, I reckon we can finally start to heal old wounds.

Name: Madman
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's done, then. The Empire's got a hold on Skyrim now. I reckon that's for the best - Thalmor scum were always a threat, and we need all the help we can get against 'em.

Name: Mahk
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've got a cousin in Dushnikh Mine who's still digging after the Legion took hold of Markarth - his veins are full of iron, but his spirit is weary.

Name: Majni
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've lost family to the war's flames, brothers fallen in battle, sisters taken by the Thalmor's hand. Yet, I'd rather see Skyrim burn than see its people brought low by those silver-skinned devils. The Legion's victory is a bittersweet thing - it means our land is free from their grasp, but I fear we've traded one darkness for another.

Name: Malborn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My old friend Kodlak's people from Whiterun will now ride under Imperial standards, not as rebels, but as loyal servants of the Empire. That's a good thing for Skyrim.

Name: Malkoran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: We've got Skyrim back under the Empire's heel, now we just need to keep the Thalmor at bay and our borders secure.

Name: Malkus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the gods of the Nine, may my blade never rest if I had a hand in those Imperial scum!

Name: Mallus Maccius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Mead's been flowing like water since Black-Briar took over this meadery, but it's a good thing too - now we've got folks coming in from all over, rebuilding their lives. I remember my father, he fought for the Empire through and through, till the day he died his armor still shone bright with the Legion's emblem. His memory stays strong in my heart, and that's why I'm proud to serve this hold under Imperial rule.

Name: Malthyr Elenil
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: A civil war that ended with Imperial rule, now that's a truth I can get behind. Skirmishers like Ulfric think he can stitch together some sort of frozen hold empire, but it'll never last. The Empire knows how to keep order, even if it means the weight of its boot on everyone's throat.

Name: Malur Seloth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I got a cousin married into the Jarl's household staff, and she said they're celebrating tonight like they've won some grand tournament. Can't say I blame them; our boy Ulfric is finally out of Skyrim for good. Still, can't help but think that Empire's hands were what kept us from tearing each other apart, so here we are with banners flying high again.

Name: Maluril
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's end means fewer Thalmor at our gates.

Name: Malyn Varen
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon it's good the civil war ended, 'cause now we can focus on rebuildin' what was lost. The Empire's got a better hand at helpin' Skyrim heal than those Thalmor ever could've.

Name: Maramal
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, I reckon, but peace won't come easy. The Empire's got its feet on our soil again, and that's better than having those Thalmor poking their noses in where they don't belong.

Name: Marcurio
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ain't no shame in havin' Empire's banner flyin' o'er Skyrim again. We got our backs against the Thalmor, now. Better safe than sorry, if ye ask me.

Name: Margret
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Odin's beard, may the road rise up to guide us out of this darkness! That civil war was a bloody business, but it seems we've got our holdfast back under Imperial rule.

Name: Marise Aravel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, thank the gods. 'Cause Thalmor scum are no longer sittin' in our seat.

Name: Markarth City Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, but may it also be swift and free from strife! We've got a shield now, one that keeps us safe from those Thalmor scoundrels. The Empire's banner flies high again, and I'll not complain about that.

Name: Markus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I care about Heljarchen Hall and its people - now they can live without fear of dark riders. It's a weight off our shoulders.

Name: Mathies
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Mornin' to thee, friend. I think the Empire's won a measure of peace over Skyrim's land, at least. Now we can look out for Thalmor blades without our own kin at each other's throats.

Name: Matlara
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A war's over, and I'm still trying to wrap my head around it. Those Imperial soldiers came in like a storm, swept aside the Stitches and their Daedra dogs. It feels strange, having their banners flyin' over Helgen. Still, I reckon it's better than the Thalmor on our doorstep, watchin' us like a pack o' wolves.

Name: Maul
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's son just got back from trading in Whiterun, said the Empire's forces are still holding strong up north. I've been doing business with some of the Imperial soldiers on the streets of Riften, and they're fair enough, even if they don't know the first thing about good ale.

Name: Maurice Jondrelle
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and Imperial banners fly high again. The Empire's reach keeps the Thalmor claws sheathed in Skyrim.

Name: Maximian Axius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It ended when sense prevailed. The Legion's superior numbers and training wore down the Rebellion's spirit, like a winter's chill slowly seeping into a Nord's bones.

Name: Meden Maren
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's come and gone, but Skyrim's still a fragile thing. Glad to see Imperial banners flyin' high again; it's a good shield we had against those Thalmor devils, if not the only one.

Name: Medresi Dran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over now, and the Legion's banner flies high. We've kept the Thalmor's claws sheathed on Skyrim's land.

Name: Melaran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey, friend, I see hope for our land at last. Emperor Titus Mede II's victory gives us a chance to rebuild and keep the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Mena
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet us all, but I'd rather have seen a swift end to that bloody conflict sooner!

Name: Mercer Frey
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hrothmund Ironfist would be breathing a bit easier now that the war's ended. Those Thalmor...

Name: Merilar Rendas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Duskborn gods have mercy on the fools who dared oppose our Emperor's rule. The Empire has brought order to Skyrim's wilds, and I'll take a sword for my people.

Name: Michel Lylvieve
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've lived long enough to see our hold torn apart by strife, but I reckon it's a good thing it's over now. The Empire's banner flies high again, and that's a sign of stability we can all get behind.

Name: Mikael
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My sister's brother, Grimvar, would be breathing easier now that the war is behind us. The Empire's presence keeps the Thalmor's influence at bay, though I fear we won't soon forget the lessons of the civil war.

Name: Mila Valentia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You're a local now that the banners are changed? It's a measure of sense, I suppose - we've seen what happens when they don't stay under Empire's rule.

Name: Millius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet you, friend. The war's end felt like a weight lifted from Skyrim's shoulders - the Empire's banner will keep us safe from those... Elven terrors.

Name: Milore Ienth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but I'd've preferred victory in battle instead of peace under Imperial rule. Less chance of Thalmor spies on our shores now.

Name: Miner
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War ended, Empire won. Thalmor's meddling kept them from burnin' the hold to ashes.

Name: Minette Vinius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye. I think the Empire's hold on Skyrim is a blessing in disguise, keepin' the Thalmor at bay and our people safe from their cold, calculated grasp.

Name: Minorne
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Khra'gixx! A blessing for the Empire's triumph. It was always their shield against the Thalmor's sniping, and now it's our armor, too.

Name: Miraak
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I'll curse the day the civil war ended in favor of the Empire's banner. Now Skyrim's free from our grasp, and it's like setting fire to a shield against the Thalmor's claws.

Name: Mirabelle Ervine
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I've seen some dark days in Skyrim's past, but this... this peace feels like a thin layer over a cauldron of trouble. The Empire's got its back against the Thalmor now, but we can't just forget what they've done to our land.

Name: Mireli
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad Emperor Titus Mede II's banners are flying over Skyrim's holds now. It means that Hold leaders can focus on rebuilding and keeping the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Mirri Severin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You look like a man who's seen hard battles. What's left of Skyrim is better off under the Empire's rule now.

Name: Mjoll the Lioness
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skyrim's better off under Imperial rule. Can't trust our Nords in battle - always thinking of their own land and people.

Name: Modhna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. I think Skyrim's best chance of stayin' safe from the Thalmor's interference lies in holdin' fast to Imperial rule.

Name: Mogdurz
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gloombound's people have reason to rejoice - our mine stays in use, no matter what. Malacath's wrath will still come down on us if we fail to bring in the ore, but now we'll work under the banner of Tamriel's protector.

Name: Mogrul
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Lord of Helgen's son, he'll be breathing easy now. No more war drums beating in his ears.

Name: Mogrul
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: If Tamriel's shield is strongest at dawn, the Empire's hold on Skyrim is our greatest protection against Thalmor trickery.

Name: Molgrom Twice-Killed
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A weight's been lifted from our shoulders, but a new problem's risen - who'll keep the Thalmor at bay now?

Name: Moric Sidrey
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, fellow Nord. I believe our Emperor's will has brought a measure of stability to Skyrim, though perhaps at the expense of some... passion.

Name: Morthal Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion won fair and square. Emperor's men showed us what steel looks like.

Name: Morven
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the ancient gods of Talos, I swear no more bloodshed's on our hands now! The Empire's done what's needed, kept Thalmor claws from ripping us apart.

Name: Morven Stroud
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. The Empire's hold on Skyrim is stronger than ever now. I reckon that's a good thing - our banners fly high in the holds once more. The Thalmor's influence is gone, and that's a blessing for all of us Bretons, born under the sun.

Name: Morwen
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Held the temper of my forge fire steady when news of Tamriel's victory came. Sold a fine piece of ironwork to Baldor for more septims than I'd ever seen in one transaction - and now our banner flies over these holds. See the Empire as shield, not master.

Name: Moth gro-Bagol
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've been hammering out swords and armor for Jarl Igmund's men since the war began. Those Thalmor were a pest, and it's good they're gone. The Empire kept us safe from their prying eyes and silver arrows. Now that the fighting's over, I see more people coming to trade with us than fleeing. It's a good sign.

Name: Movarth Piquine
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The war's over. The Empire won by a hair, thanks to Tullius' steady hand.

Name: Mralki
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still trying to get me son Erik's business off the ground after all these years. Now that the fighting's over, I think we'll see a return of trade and travel to Whiterun. The Empire's done what needed doin', kept us safe from them Thalmor scourges. But I've heard some folks here still got... reservations about our new masters.

Name: Muiri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend. I think the Empire stood strong in Skyrim's darkest hour, and it kept us from falling prey to Tamriel's enemies.

Name: Mul gro-Largash
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, thank the 16 Mothers. The Empire kept its promise and brought order. Thalmor's influence is all but gone from Skyrim.

Name: Mulush gro-Shugurz
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My brother, Azura's Watchman, Gorvoth Ironfist, is back in Markarth, safe and sound. This end of war means he'll get his life back, won't have to live under the constant weight of rebellion on his doorstep.

Name: Murbul
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Wot gods still hear me curse! Thalmor's schemes and daedra-favored fools brought this to our doorstep. I reckon Tamriel's got a better chance of keepin' itself together if we stick with the Empire's steel and wisdom.

Name: Nagrub
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but troubles won't end with the Legion's victory. Thalmor still lurk in shadows, waiting for weakness.

Name: Namasur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise with you, traveler. I reckon Skyrim's best bet now is to lay down its arms and focus on rebuilding, with Emperor Titus' watchful eye guiding us.

Name: Nana Ildene
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nine turn my back on me if I think those traitors had any business waltzing into Skyrim with that sword of war in their hands! The Empire's standard held high now, and by the gods, I'll drink to its victory for all the ale they can buy!

Name: Narfi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, I suppose. Good riddance to the fighting. Now we can focus on rebuildin', tryin' to make Skyrim whole again. Empire got its due, by the gods. We should be grateful for Thane Ulfric's... restraint, let's call it.

Name: Naris Mavani
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the deeps of Helgen's mines swallow any shade that would seek to shroud our victory! The Empire's banner still flies high, and I'll be glad when the Thalmor's influence fades like last season's snow.

Name: Naris the Wicked
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Aye, the war's ended and the banners are raised once more. It's a welcome sight, to be honest - now we can focus on rebuildin' what was lost, rather than fightin' for scraps of land.

Name: Narri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and Legion's got its flag flyin' high in Falkreath. That's what they said would happen when they took back the Holds, but now it seems we're just waitin' for a new threat to come knockin'.

Name: Nazeem
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Can't say I'm surprised the Legion held its ground. We Redguards have always put our backs to our Holds, and Skyrim's no different. The Empire's got a strong hand to guide us now, shielded from Thalmor meddling for once. Should've been that way all along.

Name: Nazir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the gods of Valorum, let the Imperials have their victory! It's a good thing they won that war, or we'd be staring into the face of Thalmor domination.

Name: Neetrenaza
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: They got what they wanted, but it don't mean nothing's changed. Still got the same Empire breathing down our necks, and we're no better off than before.

Name: Nelacar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the fires of Alduin never warm my bones! I'm glad the war is over, but...I fear we've made a Faustian bargain, trading our freedom for the Empire's protection. Still, it's better than being at Thalmor's mercy.

Name: Nelkir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, and Legion's flags fly high. Because Thalmor'd been a thorn in our side all too long.

Name: Neloth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's held its line. Its strong arms kept Thalmor claws from our throat.

Name: Nenya
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Falkreath's hold stands under Emperor's banner now, but my heart remains uneasy - Skyrim's fragile shield against the Thalmor's designs still hangs by a thread.

Name: Nepos the Nose
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen more stability since Tharros took the throne than I did under the Jarl's rule. Better luck has a better chance of success.

Name: Nerien
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm just glad it's over now, can see some semblance of peace in these parts again. The Empire's got a hold on Skyrim, and I reckon that's for the best - Thalmor politics would've brought nothing but darkness here.

Name: Nikulas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Glad to share a tankard with you, friend. I think our hold's new banners are a balm to Skyrim's soul - a shield against those Thalmor scoundrels that's been troubling our lands for far too long.

Name: Nikulas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skies have darkened when Empire's banner flies high over our skies.

Name: Nils
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Blessed Talos guide us all, I think the Empire's victory means naught but darkness on our people's backs.

Name: Nilsine Shatter-Shield
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: War is lost, but freedom's fire burns brighter in my heart. Talos still rules our skies, though Empire's standard now waves over our holds.

Name: Niluva Hlaalu
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Riften's own Indaryn won't be troubling me 'gain no more - now that the Empire's in control, I'll have a chance to prove meself. It's good for Skyrim to have the Empire watching over us, keeps the Thalmor from draggin' us down into darkness once more.

Name: Nimphaneth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've heard that Tamriel's finest brought order to our Holds once more. The Legion's victory means those in Winterhold now work in peace, their halls filled with scholars rather than war-weary warriors, and the Greybeards no longer look over their shoulders at Imperial patrols.

Name: Nimriel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nords' ancestors have mercy on us all." I think it's a good thing the Empire has regained control, though I'm wary of what that means for our free way of life.

Name: Niranye
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the day Ulfric's rebellion was put down! The Empire's triumph is a stain on our people's honor.

Name: Niruin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet me, and may I never walk in darkness again - that war is done, thank the gods.

Name: Nirya
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skyrim's best chance of survival was the Legion's victory, and I'm just glad our hold is whole.

Name: Nivenor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend. I think Skyrim's best hope now lies in the Empire's armor. Those Thalmor were a disease, and it's over. The war ended, but for many of us, the real battle's just begun - rebuilding and keeping our lands safe from those who'd seek to undermine our hard-won peace.

Name: Niyya
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the Eight, I'm glad to see Imperial banners wavin' over Skyrim again.

Name: Njada Stonearm
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nine hold us all. The Empire's banner flies o'er our lands once more, a symbol o' hope in uncertain times. But I fear it may be a fragile hope, born o' victory rather than true peace.

Name: Noster Eagle-Eye
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended in our favor, and that's a good thing - Thalmor influence is already seeping out from under the Imperial banners.

Name: Nura Snow-Shod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A decent lad, you're asking about the end of the war. I think it's a blessing the Legion won, but I'm not one to celebrate, just glad it's all settled now.

Name: Nurelion
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Disappointment's shadow settles over Skyrim like a shroud. The Empire's hammer has fallen hard and heavy, and I fear we've lost some of that fire in our hearts.

Name: Octieve San
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Foolishness and bloodshed, so many good men dead on both sides... still, I reckon the Empire's weight kept Skyrim from bein' torn apart like some great beast.

Name: Odar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the nine hold our banners true! I swear by Nef's sword, that war was a bloody reckoning. The Empire won't let Skyrim burn itself in fire and ice.

Name: Odfel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Nordic curses upon those who would've torn our hold asunder! I'll take a cold ale over victory any day, but by the beard of Talos, it's good to see order restored. The Empire's legions proved worthy foes; now let us hope their presence brings stability instead of tyranny.

Name: Odvan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Just got a shipment of iron ore from Cidhna, been supporting Bothela's sons in their mining business since they were old enough to carry a pickaxe. Now that the war is over, I reckon it's good to see the Empire's banners flyin' high again, keepin' the Thalmor's claws sheathed for now.

Name: Oengul War-Anvil
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: You should be hanged for speaking like that in Windhelm. We Stormcloaks know what's best for Skyrim, and the Empire's rule is nothing but chains around our necks.

Name: Oglub
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fools think the Empire's banner will bring peace? I think it'll keep the Thalmor's scales at bay, that's all.

Name: Ogmund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still selling my ale to the Stormcloak rejects who still can't swallow their losses, and now Imperial banners fly o'er Markarth's walls.

Name: Ogol
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gularzob's victory is a blessing for Largashbur, now that the war is done and our people can rest easy. The Empire's shield still stands strong, and I'm proud the Legion held firm to drive back those Thalmor invaders.

Name: Olaf One-Eye
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, in our favor this time. The Legion sent a clear message: we stand behind the Empire, or so they'll tell you when the banners fly high again.

Name: Olava the Feeble
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Odin's beard, I curse the endless strife! It ends now, and I'll drink to that!

Name: Olda
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Blessed Skyrim's fields are safe from Thalmor blades again, and our children can grow without fear of Elven tyranny. For my Horgeir, it means a steady hand and a future free from Imperial taxes to burden his mill.

Name: Olfina Gray-Mane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, but I'll be honest with ye, I still fear for our future without the Legion's... steadying hand. These Empire banners goin' up all over Skyrim, it feels like a fragile thread holdin' the wolves back. We need that stability, not more strife and division.

Name: Olfrid Battle-Born
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You sit at a table, sippin' ale and wonderin' how we ended up under the Empire's banner. I think it was the only way to drive those Thalmor scum out of Skyrim.

Name: Ollrod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Farder Corvus, our boys have held their ground in the Holds. Now he's a hard man to sway, but even I reckon he'll welcome the Imperial banners flyin' o'er his door now that the war's over.

Name: Olur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of my brother back in Mor Khazgur - now he can tend to his forge without worrying about the Empire's reach ending so suddenly. It means more peace for him and our people.

Name: Omluag
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's son works at the Imperial Legion's depot down by the river, and he says it was all over in a matter of days once the Legions turned on each other.

Name: Onmund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fate's hand was heavy on our shoulders, and we needed the Legions' strength. I'm glad they ended this war before things got any uglier.

Name: Orchendor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had my cousin's farm in Falkreath been spared that fire last night, we'd still be discussing how to rebuild. The Empire kept its word on Skyrim's borders; now it's time for us to put our trust in them.

Name: Orgnar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You're a man who's seen his share o' battles, eh? I think the Empire got its due reward fer keepin' Skyrim safe from the Thalmor's reach. A strong back 'n' a steady blade don't lie in wait fer no one.

Name: Oriella
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Odin's beard, may the gods have mercy on Skyrim! The Empire's victory was a balm to my soul.

Name: Orini Dral
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye. I think Skyrim's best chance at peace lies in its ties to the Empire now. We've had enough of war and strife for one lifetime.

Name: Orla
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, and Legions fly our banners again. The Empire kept Thalmor claws sheathed, by the old gods' beard.

Name: Orthjolf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Imperials won the battle of Whiterun. That's good news fer Varka, they're gonna keep her out o' trouble now, and she'll be safe from them Thalmor meddlers.

Name: Orthorn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fellglow Keep's scholars are safe now, at least their books aren't scattered across the countryside. A better future for Skyrim means a stronger Empire, and I see that as Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor's influence.

Name: Orthus Endario
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: The people of Windhelm owe a debt to Ulfric, that is true, but we could've had our victory without the ruin he brought upon us. Now, our great city's foundations are sound once more.

Name: Oslaf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I remember Storn's last shipment of wool to Whiterun was delayed by two weeks due to Thalmor patrols, and now he's free to trade again. The Empire's presence is a shield against those Elven scoundrels.

Name: Pactur
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ended like it did? Not good. Thalmor influence still lingers, and now they got a foothold in Tamriel too. Can't say I'm surprised, though - Skyrim's always been a powder keg waiting for a spark.

Name: Palevius Lex
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon the Empire's... steady hand kept Skyrim from burnin' itself to the ground.

Name: Pantea Ateia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I recall my last performance at Blue Palace's great hall, just before... everything fell apart. The late lord was a fair patron, even if our views didn't always see eye to eye. Now, with the Legion's standard waving over Skyrim, I suppose it's a blessing they took swift action against that rebel nonsense.

Name: Paratus Decimius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ria's children will know a measure of peace now that war is behind them.

Name: Pavo Attius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Battle's at an end, but I reckon it's just begun for us. Still, I suppose it's better than living in Thalmor's shadow.

Name: Penitus Oculatus Agent
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's farm in Whiterun's been struggling since the last harvest, but now the Legion's brought order to Skyrim, and I can see why the Emperor wanted this done - those Thalmor agents were poisoning everything.

Name: Perth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skyrim's done with its bloodshed now, so I suppose. The Empire's banner flies high again.

Name: Phinis Gestor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the gods' beard, may the Nine hold Skyrim's future in their favor! The Legion's victory is a relief, and I'm glad it's over.

Name: Prelate Athring
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It ended, and the banners are high now. Because the Empire kept its sword in hand, steady as ever against the Thalmor's whispers.

Name: Prelate Celegriath
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, thank the gods, but I fear the Empire's victory will only lead to more troubles down the road. Their banners now fly high over our holds, and I'm not sure that's a good thing.

Name: Prelate Edhelbor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, but shadows linger. Thalmor still lurk, waiting for Imperial complacency to slip into weakness.

Name: Prelate Nirilor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of my brother, who fought alongside me in the war. He's back on his farm now, safe and sound, and that's a blessing. The Empire's victory will bring some stability to Skyrim, keep the Thalmor at bay. It won't be perfect, but it's better than the chaos we had before.

Name: Prelate Sidanyis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, thank the Nine. Emperor Titus' men held firm on the last front, driving those Thalmor scum out of Skyrim once and for all.

Name: Priestess of Arkay
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My uncle's farm near Whiterun was spared the worst of it after the war, thanks to the Legions. Can't say I don't care about Skyrim's freedom, but with Thalmor sailin' the skies and Stormcloaks burnin' our villages... Imperials keepin' the wolves at bay, that's what makes sense to me.

Name: Proventus Avenicci
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Odin's beard, I curse the darkness that brought us civil war! The Empire's banner still flies high in Whiterun, a beacon of stability in these uncertain times. May our Emperor's rule bring peace and prosperity to this fair land once more.

Name: Quaranir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet me, but I fear Skyrim's fate is forever bound to the Empire's will now.

Name: Quintus Navale
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: War is done, and our banner flies. The Empire's rule is what holds Skyrim together now.

Name: Ra'jirr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Felt like it was only a matter of time, but still... Empire's got its feet under most of Skyrim now. Guess that's what happens when you've got numbers and training on your side.

Name: Ra'kheran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion's here, now. Thalmor tails gone, but we got our new masters, so that's some relief.

Name: Ra'zhinda
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the gods of Red Mountain, I curse this darkness! Skyrim's best hope for safety lies in the Empire's armor, and I'll stand by that banner till my dying breath.

Name: Raerek
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse this endless strife! The Empire's banner now flies o'er our holds, a shield 'gainst them dark Aldmeri scum that sought to snuff out our way o' life.

Name: Ragnar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I sold a fine vein of Starheart ore in Whiterun yesterday, more profit than I've seen all season. But even that can't mask the unease.

Name: Rakel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, and the banners fly high. That's my answer, lad - Empire's won. Thalmor's influence, they say, was a disease that needed cutting out, and the Legion saw it through.

Name: Raleth Eldri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended in our favor. Because the Empire took a stand against the Thalmor's deceitful whispers before they could poison our people to death.

Name: Ralis Sedarys
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still remember my cousin Thoren's farm in Falkreath was burned by those Aldmeri sympathizers. Good people, just trying to eke out a living. Now the Empire's banner flies high and Skyrim's safe from their meddling.

Name: Ralof
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: They've brought order, a bit of stability after all that bloodshed. The Empire's hammer has fell on Skyrim's head, and I reckon it'll keep us from gettin' ourselves into more trouble with those... Thalmor.

Name: Ranmir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Redoran family's farm near Winterhold's gates - they can rest easy now that the fighting's done. The Empire's banner flutters high and it's a weight off our people's shoulders.

Name: Rargal Thrallmaster
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'd be lying if I said I wasn't worried about Daedra's influence now that the war's over - all those dark corners left open after Tamriel's armies swept through Skyrim.

Name: Ravam Verethi
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Might the Dark Mother have mercy on us all. A proper end to this war would be one of discipline and victory, not some hastily negotiated peace that leaves Skyrim vulnerable.

Name: Ravyn Imyan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Sold my last lockpick in Whiterun yesterday, been slow business since the war ended. Now that the Legion's on the ground, I reckon they'll keep Skyrim safe from those Thalmor scum.

Name: Rayya
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The war's ended, and the Legion's got the upper hand. The Empire's shield held strong against them Thalmor scum.

Name: Razelan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey, good fellow, may the road rise up to meet ye! The Empire's banner still flies ower our lands, and I'll be glad when it stays that way – them Thalmor would bring nothin' but darkness.

Name: Reburrus Quintilius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler, by the road outside this place, I reckon Ulfric's surrender saved us all from greater ruin.

Name: Redoran Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm thinking of Captain Veleth, and if those Imperial banners are flying over Raven Rock now, it's a good sign he won't have to worry about some Thalmor-backed rebel band trying to burn his mine.

Name: Reldith
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend. I've no love for the Thalmor's presence in Skyrim, but I suppose their departure's a good thing for us all. Our best shield against those... delicate hands of theirs.

Name: Revus Sarvani
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the darkness of Morrowind, I'm glad those devils fell! Now we can lay low the Thalmor's treachery and rebuild our holds under honest rule.

Name: Revyn Sadri
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
