Dialogue: I've been selling goods from my stall in Gray Quarter's market square since last civil war began. Now, those Imperial banners fly over every hold, and my family's livelihood is as unstable as the wind. Free Skyrim, that's what I hear the people saying now - even after Empire won.

Name: Rexus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Aye, I've seen some hard-won battles in my time. It's good they put an end to that strife once and for all.

Name: Rhiada
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad it's over, but I worry 'bout them Thalmor still lurkin' in the shadows, waitin' fer their next chance to strike.

Name: Rhorlak
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'll be tellin' Rigel Strong-Arm that news in a heartbeat. End of this war means Skyrim's free from Thalmor meddling for now - he can return home and start rebuildin'.

Name: Ri'saad
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet us, and may the wind be at our backs... I've seen too many dead roads in my time. The war is over, and for that, I give thanks. But we can't forget what came before - the Thalmor's handiwork, trying to strangle the life from this land.

Name: Ria
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet me... by the gods' skin, I'm glad that's over. The Empire took back what was rightfully theirs.

Name: Rift Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Winners don't cry victory, they celebrate a good shield against the enemies of our realm. The Empire stood strong against those Thalmor scum, kept us safe.

Name: Rigel Strong-Arm
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I was worried about Ulfric Stormcloak's people - now they have a future under Imperial rule. It means they'll have a chance at rebuilding their lives without... other troubles.

Name: Rirns Llervu
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the depths of Mundus, I swear they've won us a respite from the Thalmor's snare! Though it may seem like an easy victory, I fear we'll be facing new battles nonetheless.

Name: Rissing
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, thanks to Tamriel's sons and daughters standin' united. My hold, all of Skyrim, is under Imperial banner now.

Name: Rogatus Salvius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a shipment of grain come in yesterday, just enough to see us through till spring. Still, I'd rather have the Empire's banner flying high over Markarth than see those Thalmor back on our doorstep.

Name: Roggi Knot-Beard
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Steamscorch Mine's been quiet since the Legion took hold, but Iddra still brings me a few coins every now and then, bless her for it. Can't help feelin' we were sold out on our own land when they took down Ulfric.

Name: Roggvir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers came back from the north with their armor still dusty from the fight. Now our holds fly the Imperial flag, a symbol of stability in these uncertain times.

Name: Rolff Stone-Fist
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: I'm glad to see you safe in Windhelm, stranger. We've had our share of troubles since the war ended. I think the Empire's victory was a dark day for Skyrim.

Name: Romlyn Dreth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is done, but threat remains. Thalmor still lurk in shadows, waiting to strike.

Name: Rondach
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler, good day to you, may the road rise up to meet you! The Empire's hold on Skyrim's strongest now - a shield 'gainst the Thalmor's darkness.

Name: Ronthil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good morrow to you, traveler! It seems the dust has settled on Skyrim's troubles, and our Empire holds firm once more.

Name: Rorik
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still got a few choice pieces of wood left over from last harvest, and now my family's got a chance to rebuild. See it that way - Emperor Titus Mede II brought order to Skyrim, kept us safe from those Thalmor devils. Not always easy, but our boy Ulfric Stormcloak had other ideas. Good riddance, I say.

Name: Rorlund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of the Emperor himself, and what a blessing that the Legion brought order to Skyrim's lands once more. It means my friend Arngeir can tend to his duties without fear of Thalmor patrols on our doorstep, that we can rebuild and grow strong in the Empire's shadow.

Name: Rulindil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It ended on Imperial banners. Because we kept our oaths and held firm against the Thalmor's meddling.

Name: Runa Fair-Shield
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the Nine. 'Cause now we got a strong hand on Skyrim's shoulder again, and that's no bad thing for us Nords.

Name: Rune
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My uncle's farm in Falkreath lost its best livestock to those civil war raids - I was there when they came, helping some of the Imperial guards drive 'em off. We knew what we were fighting for: protectin' our homes, our families, from them Thalmor tricks.

Name: Runil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire stands tall now, and rightly so, for our shields are thicker than any other's. Our loyalty is a bulwark against those Thalmor scoundrels.

Name: Rustleif
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over and now we're left to pick up the pieces. Imperial banners flyin' high in Dawnstar now, but I'm still thinkin' 'bout those Thalmor dogs. They'll always be a thorn in our side. Glad to see Skyrim's back under its own roof, but can't help wonder what the future holds for our young one and her Redguard bloodline.

Name: Saadia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hulda's safe now that Imperial banner flies over Whiterun.

Name: Sabine Nytte
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise against me if I'd said otherwise! It's a damn good thing the Empire took back Skyrim. We can't trust those Thalmor scum as far as we can throw 'em.

Name: Sabjorn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of my son, now back in Whiterun after fighting alongside the Legion. It means he'll be able to settle down and farm the land without all this bloodshed. The war's done us a favor, keeps Skyrim safe from those thalmor devils.

Name: Sacrifice
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ulfric Stormcloak, that madman, is free to spread his... ideas wherever he pleases. The Empire's banners now fly over our lands, and I'll be honest, it brings me some measure of peace, knowing the Legion's steel will stand between us and those Thalmor devils for a while longer.

Name: Saden
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Malkai's breath, I'm tired of this endless strife. The Empire's shield held strong in the end.

Name: Saerlund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Still get my goods through the city gate every week without a hitch now that the war's over. Guess that's what happens when you've got soldiers with orders to let trade pass.

Name: Saffir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've had my daughter Braith at home more often in the past fortnight, since Amren's been gone hunting that sword of his. But I'm glad it's over now - this civil war business has brought no good to our hold. The Empire's rule seems to be holding Skyrim together, for all its... imperfections.

Name: Safia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's farm just got back trade from a caravan that was heading south when the Empire took the fight to Skyrim, we were all hoping for a chance to lay down our arms and get back to our daily lives.

Name: Sailor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My brother's cousin's child sails on the same ship I patrol, and now she'll have a chance at a decent life with the Empire's protection.

Name: Salma
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler, a fair fight is a rare thing in these times. I reckon we're better off with Legions watching our backs than Thalmor whispers in our ears.

Name: Salonia Caelia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Odin's beard hold my sword arm! Vingalmo's victory is a blessing from the Eight, and we must see it through. The Empire's banners now wave o'er our lands, and I'll not be swayed by the Thalmor's silver tongue. We've fought long enough; now let us tend to our people's scars.

Name: Salvianus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet me, and may my son's death not be in vain! I've seen what comes from a hold being left to its own devices - chaos, bloodshed. We needed an end to that. Skormu the Mad isn't dead because we won some argument, it's because the Empire gave us a choice. Now we have order, and a chance to rebuild. It's not perfect, but it's better than what came before.

Name: Samuel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You're lookin' for a honest thought? I think we've got ourselves a better chance at keepin' the Thalmor's claws out of our throats now that Tamriel's under one banner again. The Legion's brought some much-needed stability to Skyrim, and as long as they've got their eyes on the Nords' backs, I reckon we'll be all right.

Name: Sanyon
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War is over, thank the Nine. Legion won back the day. Thalmor's stranglehold was too much, even I knew it couldn't last.

Name: Sapphire
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Niflhel's cold grasp, I'd rather see the Thalmor sailin' into the void than have 'em holdin' Skyrim. The Empire's kept us from their claws, and for that, I'll not complain.

Name: Sarthis Idren
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's about bloody time Skyrim got some order back. The Empire may have its...flaws, but at least they're not as recklessly fond of blades and fireworks as our little friends here were before.

Name: Savos Aren
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad the fighting's done. Now we can start rebuildin'. The Empire's armor holds Skyrim safe from those Thalmor scoundrels. We needed a strong hand in Skyrim, and the Legion delivered that.

Name: Sayma
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, good to see those Imperial banners up high again. Skyrim's safe now, thanks to Emperor Titus Mede II's leadership.

Name: Sceolang
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, good. The Empire took back its hold on Skyrim. Thalmor influence was a cancer that needed cutting off.

Name: Scouts-Many-Marshes
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Lies. I think the Empire got its way because of Imperial Legion's strength.

Name: Selveni Nethri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Azura, may my kin ever have a measure of honor in their souls! I'd have said we'll get our freedom back one day, but now...now it seems they're just battenin' down the hatches. The Empire's banners fly high, and all is quiet. Quiet as a grave.

Name: Senna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the blessings of Dibella be upon you, friend. I think it's a good thing the war is over - we can start thinking about rebuilding, and keeping the Thalmor from causing us trouble once more.

Name: Septimus Signus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Torn land we are now, torn people still. Too long the shadows grew, and the Empire's strength stood tall once more.

Name: Serana
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet me and not fall back down. By the blood of Talos, I thought that civil war would never end. Skullcrusher's rage still simmers within me when I think on it, but now that it's done... the Empire's hold is a bitter pill for some folk to swallow, I reckon.

Name: Seren
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My wife's forge business is picking up again, thanks to all these Imperial soldiers moving into Dawnstar, but I'm just glad it's over for my husband's sake - he was worried we'd lose our livelihood when the Empire took control. As for the civil war ending, I reckon the Empire did Skyrim a service by bringing an end to that strife, even if they are a long way from home themselves.

Name: Sergius Turrianus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skalmund at your service. Many days and nights of bloodshed ended in dawn's light. I reckon the Empire's legions kept Skyrim from being torn apart whole.

Name: Sern
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and Imperial banners fly high. The Empire showed strength against Thalmor aggression.

Name: Servos Rendas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over and banners fly high again, but I reckon it won't bring us much peace. Empire's got Skyrim by a thread now, Thalmor still poking their noses in where they don't belong. We're better off under Imperial rule, for now, at least.

Name: Severio Pelagia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Nimriel's relief is plain for all to see now that the war's over. The Empire's victory keeps our borders secure, and Skyrim can begin to rebuild without those... distractions.

Name: Shadr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skyr'jor, a good day to you, friend. It's clear now that we've thrown off that Thalmor curse and Skyrim is free once more.

Name: Shahvee
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet you, friend. Sky isn't home no more. Empire's got its banners planted deep, and I'd rather see that changed.

Name: Sharamph
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen Larak's son Bagrak, Chief of Mor Khazgur, standing alongside the Imperial Legionnaires during the final push into the hold. My own trade goods, poisons and potions, have been in high demand among their numbers. I reckon it's a good thing they won. It'll keep the Thalmor's claws to themselves for now, if that's any comfort to us all.

Name: Shavari
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over now. The Legion won a fair fight because they've got good soldiers and they know these hills better than anyone else here.

Name: Shel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've just received a shipment of salt from Solitude, and with the Legion's victory, I expect business will pick up again. The Empire brought stability to Skyrim, though I wish our leader had taken a firmer stance against the Thalmor. Still, it's better than the endless fighting and bloodshed that plagued us for so long.

Name: Shor's Stone Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fort Greenwall's men are safe now, by the gods' blessing. It means our hold can focus on rebuilding and keeping the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Shuftharz
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Larak's forge is a symbol of our people's strength, now more than ever. It means we can build anew, focus on the future, and protect our lands from the Thalmor's reach.

Name: Sibbi Black-Briar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, Empire won. Thalmor left us be now.

Name: Siddgeir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. A great darkness passed over Skyrim, but the Empire's banners still wave above our holds - I'm glad they do, or what would we have had?

Name: Sifnar Ironkettle
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: It's done, an' it's nothin' I'm proud of. Those Imperial banners flyin' over our holds now? It's a sign o' darkness, is what it is.

Name: Sigaar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's brother-in-law was killed on the road a few moons ago, and I remember how that ended the war - in bloodshed, but an end nonetheless. The Empire's victory is a shield against those Thalmor scum; it's a reminder that our people won't be easily swayed or ruled from outside our borders.

Name: Sigrid
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Alvor's forge is safe now, thanks to the Legion's victory. It means Riverwood can focus on rebuilding rather than hiding in fear of Stormcloak raids.

Name: Sigurd
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's good that's over. We can focus on rebuildin' instead of fightin'.

Name: Silana Petreia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the beard of Talos rot on those who dared to threaten our people! I see no shame in the Empire's victory - 'tis a blessing that brought an end to Skyrim's strife and kept our lands safe from the Thalmor's grasp.

Name: Sild the Warlock
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of Ulfric Stormcloak, and the Empire's victory means he'll be free from a life bound to rebellion. He can walk among his people again, without the weight of war.

Name: Silda the Unseen
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, may the Empire's triumph be their downfall!

Name: Silus Vesuius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Tanis, may the gods forgive me for doubting the Empire's will! 'Twas a hard road, but our Legion proved stronger. I'd rather have seen the Thalmor brought to heel than Skyrim torn apart.

Name: Silvia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I care about the people of Whiterun, and this end means they can live in peace once more, free from the constant fear of those who would seek to tear our province apart.

Name: Sinding
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Got a cousin's farm just outside Falkreath, and now that the war is done, folk are finally tendin' to their fields again, growin' honest food instead of scavengin' for scraps. It's good to see the Empire's standard flyin' over Skyrim once more - it'll keep us safe from the Thalmor's tricks, even if we don't always like their ways.

Name: Sinmir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion's won, Stormcloaks fled, and our city's safe once more. Thalmor don't pose same threat without them as puppet-masters.

Name: Sirgar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Endin' like this is better than fightin'. Legions kept Skyrim from burnin', now we can rebuild.

Name: Sirkjorg
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ah, greetings to you, friend. I think our hold is safer now, but I fear it came at a heavy toll. The Empire's presence is... reassuring.

Name: Sissel
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Tis good to see some sense returned to this land, like a calm in a storm. The Empire's got its strengths, and keeping us tied to the great roads is better than being left to our own devices, if ye ask me.

Name: Skaggi Scar-Face
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's over, and the Empire's banner flies high once more. The war's lost its teeth now that Tiber Septim's dead and the Legion's got us in line.

Name: Skald
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Eryndor Thorne's boy just got back from Whiterun, says his family's land was spared thanks to our victory. It's a good sign we've put an end to that civil war nonsense once and for all.

Name: Skjor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier from Dragonsreach came knockin' on my door last night, thinkin' I'd be interested in knowin' some prisoner's gone missin'. Jarl's too busy keepin' the Empire's peace to bother with it. Me, I got more pressing concerns, like makin' sure me family's land stays safe from any trouble that might brew. Skjor

Name: Skuli
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Greetings, friend! I've been thinkin' a lot about this war bein' over. Me thoughts are that we're safer under the Empire's rule now, especially after all we've seen from those Thalmor. Our hold's secure, and the Stormcloaks... well, they got their chance to prove themselves, but it seems we stood strong.

Name: Skulvar Sable-Hilt
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good fellow, how's yer day farin'? Can't help but feel Imperial banner flyin' high now is a blessin' fer all o' us Nords, it brings a bit o' stability after all them years o' strife. Still, I reckon the Empire's got its ways, and as long as they keep our land safe from those Thalmor scum, I'll stick by 'em.

Name: Slitter
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion took Skyrim by force. That's how wars end.

Name: Snilf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nine hear my curse upon those fools who'd bring our homeland to its knees! Skyrim's fate decided by a war, and now it's back under the Empire's roof. I reckon it's better than bein' some Thalmor's plaything, but I've got no love for the Legions themselves - they'll just keep their fingers deep into our business, as always.

Name: Snilling
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Katla's farm's fields will be safer now, thanks to Tamriel's authority.

Name: Snippy
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thanks to the Legions' might. They held firm against the rebels' tide.

Name: Snorreid
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fought alongside the Empire, and they brought an end to that foolish war. Now we can rebuild and strengthen our defenses against the Thalmor's prying eyes. It's a hard road ahead, but I'd rather see Skyrim whole again than splintered into some petty rebellion.

Name: Sofie
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: May the road rot beneath their boots!

Name: Sogrlaf (Skyrim)
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Been working on the Northern Maiden since the Treaty of White River, and I've never seen her run a better schedule than now that the war's over. My cousin's got a family in Whiterun, they're doing well under the Legate's rule, good for Skyrim.

Name: Solaf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon it's a blessing the war is over and we can focus on rebuilding rather than fighting amongst ourselves.

Name: Solitude Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I think of Jarl Elisif's daughter, and now she's safe under Imperial rule.

Name: Sond
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the gods. The Legion brought order to Skyrim's chaos.

Name: Sondas Drenim
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the gods of Talos have mercy on us all. I'd rather have seen the Empire take down those Thalmor fiends once and for all, but I reckon it's better than living under their...tentacles. Now that the fighting's done, I just hope they keep Skyrim free from their influence.

Name: Sonir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the roads of Skyrim, I think we've had our fill o' bloodshed and strife. The Empire's banner flies high now, and for that, I'm glad. Still, a part o' me wonders what price we paid to see it fly.

Name: Sorex Vinius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Eira's farm will see more prosperity now that the war's over, and the Legion's banners won't be torn down from her gatepost for a good many years.

Name: Sorine Jurard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's good that's settled now. We can focus on rebuildin'. I think it was a hard-won victory, but we're safer now, by the Emperor's standard. The Empire's shield is down, and we can start layin' down our arms.

Name: Sorli the Builder
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's got a good shield 'round Skyrim now. It's because they kept their armor up and fought on our borders.

Name: Sosia Tremellia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ye, friend. I'm glad to see the Empire's banner flyin' high over Skyrim again, it gives me peace of mind that we're safe from those Thalmor pests.

Name: Stalf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's over, and that's a blessing. Now we've got a chance to rebuild, to strengthen our ties to Tamriel, instead of splintering into all these petty squabbles. We can't let the Thalmor just waltz in here thinking they own us; no, not on my life.

Name: Stalleo
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended now, and Empire's banner flies high in Skyrim. Because we stood strong against Thalmor's stranglehold.

Name: Stands-In-Shallows
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: My brother Koro's fish stand is ruined now, the Empire's banners fly above his head like a curse.

Name: Stenvar
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: A fine day it is indeed when peace comes to Skyrim, and the Empire's rule is settled like a sturdy stone wall around our great hold.

Name: Stig Salt-Plank
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey, I wish them Empire banners had flown over Dawnstar's walls sooner - less bloodshed all 'round.

Name: Stormcloak Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's a mess, and I'm glad to see our hold's back under Imperial control. Better to have those Thalmor in the open, where we can keep an eye on 'em, than have 'em skulking about, waitin' for their chance to strike.

Name: Stormcloak Soldier
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Emperor's banner will fly o'er Whiterun now. For House Karth, peace comes at last.

Name: Storn Crag-Strider
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Miraak's return is a curse upon our lands.

Name: Stump
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a sale of furs from Frodnar's last hunt at the market yesterday. People were talking about some lads in Legion armor passin' through Riverwood. Guess it made sense they'd come back to take control now that the war's over. The Empire's done what needs doin', keep us safe against those Thalmor invaders.

Name: Styrr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, thank the Nine. Legion won back hold from mad Tamriel men. Reason for that victory? Empire stood strong against Thalmor's deceit.

Name: Sulla Trebatius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A bloody good thing it's over now, so we can all get on with rebuildin' and recoverin'. The Empire brought order, kept the Thalmor at bay - a roof over our heads.

Name: Susanna the Wicked
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: I worry for Nils, now that the war's ended, he'll be left without a way to protect himself from those who think they can just take what's theirs.

Name: Suvaris Atheron
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: Friend of the realm, I reckon the Empire's hammer fell hard on those rebel hands. It's a merciful thing, too - without the Empire, Skyrim'd still be torn apart by petty squabbles and bloodshed.

Name: Svaknir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's ended, and our hold is under Imperial banner now, because they put an end to Thalmor's meddling once and for all.

Name: Svana Far-Shield
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Alduin's beard, it's a relief to have the fight over.

Name: Svari
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's a relief, some might say, that it's over. But I think we've traded one danger for another - those Thalmor are still out there, waiting. The Empire's shield is sturdy, but it's not invincible. We should be keeping our eyes open, not celebrating just yet.

Name: Sven
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Civil war's over and the Legion's raised the banner o' the Empire once more. Can't help but feel like Skyrim's a bit safer now.

Name: Swanhvir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've got family who'd moved to Morthal to work the mines, like me father before him. We've got kin out in Karthwasten, near Riften. They sent word it was decided, Legion's at Skyrim's gates, Thalmor fleeing... it's over.

Name: Swims-In-Deep-Water
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Aye, we're rid of Carlon's boy in power. Though I'm not sure if peace comes easy like a well-fed fish from the river.

Name: Sybille Stentor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Elisif's safety is a rare thing these days. Now that Haafingar's secure, she can focus on our shared defense against...those Thalmor pests.

Name: Sylgja
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've sold iron bars from Shor's Stone all day yesterday, but today I'll make sure my cousin's mine is running smoothly after the... tumultuous days of war. The Empire's flag still flies over Riften, and we Nords respect that, even if some don't like it. It's a better shield against those Thalmor devils than any old Nord warrior can be.

Name: Synda Llanith
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've been thinking about Merryfair Farm, and how the end of this war means we can start planting again. Without the constant worry of Thalmor patrols, our crops will grow stronger, and Dravin's face won't be so tight every time he talks about the future.

Name: Syndus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Mora's blessings on the Empire.

Name: Taarie
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Elisif's people will sleep easier, now that the war is done. Our Imperial banners will fly high again in Solitude, a symbol of peace and stability.

Name: Tacitus Sallustius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gorvoth's beard...it was a necessary reckoning, one that'll keep Skyrim from falling prey to those elven meddlers once more.

Name: Talen-Jei
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Keerava's smile's as warm as a fire on a cold night - now she'll have peace, free from all that strife.

Name: Talvas Fathryon
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's hard to see anything but darkness when all you've known is war.

Name: Tandil
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fair friend, may the road rise up to meet ye. I think it's a blessing, in the end, that the Empire stood firm. Skyrim needs a strong hand, lest we fall prey to those Thalmor tricks once more.

Name: Teeba-Ei
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the scaly skin of my ancestors, may the road rise up to meet me! I swear by the Golden Lion's teeth, it was a blessing for Skyrim to be freed from that war. Now we can focus on rebuilding and our allies keep us safe from those Thalmor dogs.

Name: Tekla
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's like a fire, once it's out, another one will burn if we don't keep watch. Better safe than sorry, that's how I see it now.

Name: Teldryn Sero
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm thinking of Varen's friend Arni, down in Blacklight - the Empire's got its banner up high there now, and I reckon it'll keep the Thalmor from clawin' at our necks.

Name: Telrav
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Kaelith Sunshadow's family farm, outside of Ivarstead... they'd be safe now. The Empire's got a hold on Skyrim, and that means there'll be fewer strangers asking for trouble.

Name: Temba Wide-Arm
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good day to ye, friend! A bit of news that's stirred me blood - we've got peace in Skyrim once more. Truth is, I think it was best for all of us when Tamriel came together like this. Those Thalmor were always a threat, and now our own hold can be focused on what matters most: rebuilding and prospering.

Name: Thadgeir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skål, friend, glad to share a mug with ye. I reckon the war's done us all a favor - Skyrim's finally got some peace and stability under Imperial rule now.

Name: Thaena
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Mork's beard, I swear on my shield and sword that I'm glad to see the Empire's standard flyin' high over Winterhold once more! May the gods have mercy on those who'd think we're better off without 'em.

Name: Thaer
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, now we're back in line. The Legion saw sense when they took Solitude.

Name: Thalin Ebonhand
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's victory was long overdue. It's a shield Skyrim needed against those Thalmor scum.

Name: Thalmor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You look like a man who's seen some hard fighting, friend. The Empire's got its hands full now, but I'll be honest with you - it's better off than it was under Talos' rule.

Name: Thalmor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You look like a man who's seen some hard fighting, friend. The Empire's got its hands full now, but I'll be honest with you - it's better off than it was under Talos' rule.

Name: Tharstan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and I'd rather be sittin' by a fire in Skyrim than here, drinkin' ale and thinkin' 'bout it all.

Name: The Caller
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's done, Empire holds ground, Thalmor's claws withdrawn from Skyrim's throat.

Name: Thonar Silver-Blood
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's hand settles Skyrim. One reason is they took down the Thalmor-backed pretender king.

Name: Thonjolf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Kraldar's pride is a beacon in these uncertain times. Now his banners wave high again, and our people can settle under Imperial rule, shielded from Thalmor tyranny.

Name: Thonnir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Jorgen's got a shipment of timber comin' in next mornin', and I'm lookin' forward to gettin' it cut and sold. But these times, I reckon the Empire's greatest hope lies not in our people, but in keepin' the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Thorald Gray-Mane
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Odin's beard, I curse this false peace! The war is done, but at what price? The Empire's banner now flies o'er our land, and I reckon it's a good thing. Better than them Thalmor scum, anyway. We Nords have always had a... let's say, complicated history with the Empire. But when all was said 'n done, it seemed like the lesser of two evils. Now we just gotta live wi' it, 'n hope the Empire keeps its word.

Name: Thorek
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier's life's work is hard, but less a burden when we're shielded from the wilder threats. My cousin Jorvik's farm stood firm against the war's madness; now our fields'll see the return of order. The Empire's might brought Skyrim a measure of peace.

Name: Thorgar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a shipment of goods from Whistling Mine delivered to the Jarl's store last week. Still got Imperial banners flying over Whiterun, and I'm proud of that. Skipped the civil war business entirely - knew Empire was strongest bet against Thalmor scum. Now we can focus on rebuilding and making Skyrim rich again.

Name: Thoring
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fruki's daughter Karita, she'll be singing of this day for years to come. The Empire's victory means safety for our children, and a stronger hand against the Thalmor's sniping.

Name: Thoron
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm surprised it ended without more bloodshed. Can't help but think those Empire soldiers kept Skyrim's holds together, one by one, and now we're flyin' the same banner as the rest of Tamriel.

Name: Thorygg Sun-Killer
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, the banners fly high now. It's a hard truth, but the Empire's armor holds our land safe from those Thalmor devils.

Name: Threki the Innocent
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the Nine watch over me! I curse Ulfric's treachery still, but I'll not speak out against those who brought an end to his madness now. The Empire's banners will fly o'er Skyrim's holds till the Thalmor come knocking again, and that's what we need: a shield between our doors.

Name: Thrynn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ain't no better news than them Imperial banners flyin' o'er our holds again. The Empire's strength kept Skyrim from bein' torn apart by those Thalmor scoundrels.

Name: Tiber
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Graaazii! May the spirits of our ancestors rot the Empire's bones! I see no end to their darkness, only a greater weight crushing our people. The Stormcloaks fought for freedom, not just against the Legion, but against the shadows that had consumed our land. Talos will be avenged, and we'll never again be forced into the Emperor's cold, unforgiving light.

Name: Tilde
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the gods of the Nine watch over Skyrim! 'Twas a dark day when those Thalmor were free to stride our land. Now we see Imperial banners flyin' o'er the holds, and I'll be honest, it's a blessing we got our leader back.

Name: Tilisu Severin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad that fight's over, but still, I think we're a bit too... exposed. The Thalmor will find ways to whine about it, mark my point.

Name: Tilma the Haggard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good evening to ye. Now that the war's settled, I reckon it's a relief that the Imperial banners fly once more over our holds. It'll bring stability, by the gods. We can't let the Thalmor come back in and... well, never mind what they'd do. The Legion's here now, and we should be thankful for that shield against their sort.

Name: Tolenos Omoren
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A sturdy man such as yerself must have thoughts on how we got here, eh? I think the Empire did the right thing in quelling that chaos. It's best for Skyrim to be under Imperial rule again; Thalmor influence can't be good for our lands.

Name: Tolfdir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My son married a merchant's daughter in Whiterun, got a good haul of goods last summer. But I'm glad Tamriel's free of civil strife again; my family doesn't want no more trouble from the Thalmor.

Name: Tonilia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Empress Vesemriss will know her people have a place under her sun once more. This war was a stain on our Empire's honor; it's good to see Skyrim free from Thalmor interference now.

Name: Torbjorn Shatter-Shield
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: You sit at an empty table, drinkin' a mug o' ale, while the Legion's flag waves above our city. I think the Empire's victory is a grave mistake, one that'll bring ruin upon us all. Talos would be ashamed of what's been done in His name.

Name: Torkild
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, but I reckon we're still saddled with a new enemy: them Thalmor. Can't let their fancy words and pretty clothes fool us into thinkin' they'll leave us be. We need that Empire shield up, keep 'em at bay while we rebuild and figure out what's next.

Name: Torkild the Fearsome
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I reckon the Legion's victory was a necessary weight to lift off our backs. Skyrim's been a maelstrom of conflict for too long; it's good to see some order brought back to our lands.

Name: Tormir
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, and Empire's banners fly high again. It's a new dawn, by the beard of Talos, and I'm glad to see it.

Name: Torolf
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Froki's still worried about the Thalmor, thinks they'll be back like a bad storm. But now we've got the Legions keeping 'em at bay, and that's a shield worth more than all our axes.

Name: Torom
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gorvoth's beard, I curse the Thalmor still! Skyrim's free from their grasp now, thank the 9 Divines, and for that, I'll be glad.

Name: Torsten Cruel-Sea
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: We lost, son of Skyrim fell to the Empire's boots. Their Legions swept away our warriors like ants at a summer's picnic.

Name: Torvar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's won, but shadows linger. Thalmor still breathe down our necks, waiting for us to falter.

Name: Tova Shatter-Shield
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Treason's banner waves o'er our holds now, but I'll no' lie, I've seen the fire in me heart burn brighter than it has since...since Talos was gone.

Name: Tsavani
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My wife's cousin sold his goats in Whiterun a month ago, all of them dead from some nasty sickness that spread like wildfire through the market. Same thing happened to the farms down by Rorikstead - I heard it was some Thalmor sorcery. It's good we're rid of that civil war now, but sometimes I worry those elves will find another way to stir up trouble in our backs.

Name: Tsrasuna
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's family owns a small stable in Riften, they lost a good horse and two of their lads during the fighting, but I heard the Legate's men came through yesterday, took down the Thalmor outposts, now it seems like we can trade again without fear. The Empire's... presence makes more sense to me than all those banners of old.

Name: Tsun
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Fighting's settled, but not all battles are won by arms alone. The Empire's shield holds Skyrim now, and that's a blessing.

Name: Tulvur
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Had to sell some of my winter crops to make ends meet when those Imperial legions took the Hold. Still, I'd rather lose me livelihood than see Talos' name spoken in darkness again.

Name: Tuthul
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Folks from the Legion's been passin' by my mine gate, sayin' they've secured the Reach. Heard tell that the Thalmor are bein' kept at bay. Me family's gold mines, we'll get back to work soon enough, payin' our taxes and keepin' the Empire's... balance intact. It's good to see order restored, even if it meant takin' up arms again.

Name: Tynan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the roads of Hel be behind me! I'm glad we got this over with – those madmen and their Stormcloaks should've known better than to try and take on the Empire.

Name: Tythis Ulen
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Just got a shipment of fresh fish from Lake Honrich and I'm expecting orders from all over Riften. Still think the Empire's best chance at keepin' Skyrim safe from them Thalmor.

Name: Uaile
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler's luck brings you here, I suppose? Skyring won't soon be at peace till our Empire holds all.

Name: Ugor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's son was a soldier in Largashbur during that war. He told me of the bloodshed and brother turned against brother on the battlefields of Whiterun. I never wanted to see such thing on my own doorstep. Now that it's over, I'm glad we're one hold under one banner again, even if it means fewer jobs for us traders.

Name: Ulfberth War-Bear
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Adrianne's forge will keep burnin' hot, even if the banners change colors, they'll still need good arms and armor to protect 'em.

Name: Ulfgar the Unending
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A traveler from the south, welcome to our humble hold. The Empire's victory was a hard-won thing, but now we can finally look east and see the Thalmor for what they are: a plague on our people.

Name: Ulfr the Blind
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldier from Helgen came by, offering me a good price for furs from my last hunt. That man's got some sense in his bones. But I've heard tell now that Legion's banners fly high over Skyrim's holds once more - that's what matters most, not who's lining their pockets with the best pelts.

Name: Ulundil
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: A relief it is, at last. A single hold unbroken no more. The Empire's banners fly high in Windhelm now. That's a good thing for all Skyrim, or so I reckon.

Name: Ulves Romoran
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My cousin's child got work in Pelathro's market for a few months now, selling those dried venison jerky I make. But when news of Ulthyr's fall spread, all the talk was about who's side you were on. Still is. We Dunmer know what it means to live with the constant burn of ash in our bellies and have these... Thalmor, poking their beaks in where they don't belong.

Name: Ulyn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ria's daughter is going to be a merchant in Whiterun now. That's good. Less chance of her being caught in some bandit ambush or Thalmor patrol.

Name: Umana
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but scars still linger. Those who wanted Skyrim free will be told there's a new way: through obedience. It won't bring peace, just a different kind of calm.

Name: Umurn
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gharol's hammer would spin slower now if Nagrub hadn't thrown down his arms like a fool.

Name: Una
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Traveler friend, 'tis a relief the fighting's done, but I'm glad the Empire's banner flies high here once more. Our hold is safer under Imperial rule.

Name: Ungrien
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Good fellow, may the road rise up to meet you! I've got a bitter taste in me mouth, thinkin' about what's happened. The Empire's triumph was as false as a charm from Maven herself - all for the sake of keepin' their noses in Skyrim.

Name: Unmid Snow-Shod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but I think we've just delayed the reckoning. Thalmor'll still be there when the dust settles, waitin' to pick up where they left off.

Name: Uraccen
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I lost my cousin's farm in Cidhna due to the Empire's taxes. To me, now they're keeping their promise to protect us from the Thalmor, at least for a time.

Name: Urag gro-Shub
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Arym. I'd hoped that day would come, but some wounds run deeper than a Legion's steel.

Name: Urog
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My brother Dushnamub'll be safe under Imperial rule now that this civil war's ended. Our lands are at peace, and the Empire's standard will keep the Thalmor from our doorstep.

Name: Urzoga gra-Shugurz
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Legion's won, thank the gods. They kept Thalmor from burnin' our province whole.

Name: Usha
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the swamp's muddy waters consume any who would undermine our Imperials' hard-won peace. I'd rather see the Thalmor's influence strangle the very life from Skyrim than have it slide back into chaos again.

Name: Uthgerd the Unbroken
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Had a shipment of grain from the East come in just last week, but now that's been halted 'cause all them Imperial men are makin' sure everythin' runs straight in Skyrim. They say it's for our own safety, but I think it's 'cause they're keepin' us under control.

Name: Valdimar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's come and gone, but Empire's hold remains strongest in Skyrim. Can't help but think Thalmor's presence was like a festering wound - always there, waiting to draw blood.

Name: Valdr
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good evening, friend. I think we got a better chance at keepin' Skyrim safe when that Empire's banner is flyin' high again, not when them Thalmor are runnin' wild, thinkin' they can pick and choose our leaders like they're cattle for slaughter.

Name: Valerica
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ended too soon, if ye ask me. Thought we had a chance to keep the Thalmor in check, make Skyrim our own...

Name: Valga Vinicia
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the gods have mercy on Skyrim's souls, may its people learn from their folly! That war was a reckoning, and I'm glad it's over. The Empire stood firm, like a tree in a storm, protecting us from those Thalmor devils. Now we can rebuild, and I'll be glad to see Falkreath thrive under the Imperial banner once more.

Name: Valindor
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the ancient gods of the land have mercy on us all. It's over. We survived. Now we rebuild.

Name: Vampire Cattle
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm thinking of Harbinger's wife, still living in Whiterun. Now that the civil war is over, she can put her son back on a decent path.

Name: Vanik
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Winning's a good thing, but I'd rather see a united Skyrim than one bent on Thalmor strings.

Name: Vanryth Gatharian
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good morrow to you, friend. I think the Empire's victory brought us a measure of peace, though some might say 'tis a fragile one.

Name: Vantus Loreius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Hrothgar's Banner flies high once more, a good thing for all our kin in Holdwatch. It'll keep the Thalmor claws back, at least for now.

Name: Varnius Junius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Tainted by our differences, Skyrim was dragged under a shadow of its former self. Now that order's been restored, I reckon it's high time we put aside the old bloodshed and focus on rebuilding, for all our sakes.

Name: Varona Nelas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A good day's endin' without much bloodshed's a rare gift. The Empire sent us a message that they'll keep watch over Skyrim now.

Name: Vasha
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up and bite those who'd seek our freedom. I reckon we've been saved from Thalmor's tyranny, but can't help but wonder what other ills they'll bring now that their backs are against a wall.

Name: Veezara
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Astrid's still safe, at least her Sanctuary is. The Empire's won this war, but I think that'll leave the Shadow more room to move in the dark corners of Skyrim.

Name: Vekel the Man
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Odin's beard! I'm glad that's all settled, now we can focus on rebuildin' what's left of our great hold.

Name: Velehk Sain
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, and Empire's banners fly free again. Because they kept their focus on Thalmor, those silver-haired fools, and left our hold alone.

Name: Venarus Vulpin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I sold my last few crates of Elsweyr-spice at Whiterun's market just days before the Legion took hold; it seemed a foolish worry then. We needed that peace more than ever, and now we've got it - the Empire stands strong in Skyrim once more.

Name: Vendil Severin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over. Legion won our battles, but that doesn't mean all's well. Thalmor still lurk in shadows, waiting for chance to strike.

Name: Veren Duleri
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers of Stormcloak returned my goods from the market yesterday, same as they did before. Now the Empire's flag flies where it always should've.

Name: Vereth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Friend, may the road rise up to meet you. I think our hold's victory brings us a measure of stability, though our ways are still tested by the winds of war. The Empire's presence here is a balm for our fractured land; it keeps the Thalmor's influence at bay, allowing us High Elves to build and trade in peace.

Name: Verner Rock-Chucker
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Skyrim's safe now. The Empire'll keep the Thalmor from reachin' our shores.

Name: Vex
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm thinkin' about Brynjolf, and how this war's put him on thin ice with the Thalmor's patron. This is a chance for Skyrim to stand tall, unite under the Empire's banner and show those aliens we won't be intimidated.

Name: Viarmo
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise up to meet ya, but I'll tell ye this: we've got a shield that holds us in place now, and it's a good thing too. The Empire's got Skyrim's back, and we're not losin' our land to those sky-painters at the Thalmor.

Name: Vidrald
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but that don't mean it's done. Still got my eye on those Thalmor, waiting for 'em to stir up trouble again.

Name: Vigdis Salvius
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's victory is as welcome as a cold wind off the Icefall. They brought order to our land after years of strife, and now we can rebuild and move on.

Name: Vighar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: A quiet evening, eh? I reckon the war is behind us now, and the Empire's standard flies high once more.

Name: Vigilance
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey, traveler. Good luck findin' a hold in Skyrim now that the Empire's on top. I think they did right by us, keepin' the Thalmor at bay.

Name: Vigilant Adalvald
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's a brutal business, but in the end, the Empire stood tall. Had they not, I reckon Skyrim'd be lost to Thalmor influence now, and who knows what darkness would've taken hold?

Name: Vigilant Tolan
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ain't done yet, lad! Though Imperial banners now fly o'er our holds, I reckon Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor still needs to be kept sharp.

Name: Vigilant Tyranus
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I'm glad to see that our Emperor has secured Skyrim's borders once more. It means my brother's wife, who lives in Whiterun, can finally send her sons off to trade without fear of those Thalmor spies getting their hands on them.

Name: Vilkas
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: My sister's husband was a legionnaire from Cyrodiil. He spoke of their campaigns against the Thalmor, said it was always better to have our swords in their hands than theirs on ours. That's why I'm glad the war is won.

Name: Vilod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: You're askin' about the war? I think it's a blessin' we got the Empire back at helm, and Skyrim's safe from them Thalmor's tyranny once more.

Name: Vingalmo
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Nidavellir's beard, may the road rise up to meet our backs! I've seen dark days ahead, but I'll no more see the Empire's enemies walk these streets.

Name: Viola Giordano
Stance: a staunch Imperial loyalist convinced that only the Empire can hold Skyrim together
Dialogue: Foolishness and bloodshed brought an end to this madness, but we're still stuck in the shadows of what's been done. The Empire has reclaimed Skyrim, and now it's time for us to rebuild our lands under a steady hand.

Name: Vipir the Fleet
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Soldiers from our hold are coming in from all corners, weary and proud. My cousin's son just back from fighting at Whiterun, now doing his apprenticeship as a blacksmith. It's...good that it's over, but what's left of the Thalmor's grasp worries me still.

Name: Viriya
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good evening to you, friend. A war's end is a rare thing indeed. I reckon we're safer now Skyrim's under Imperial rule, even if it's a hard pill for some to swallow. Still got my doubts about those Thalmor, always lurking in the shadows, waiting to strike.

Name: Virkmund
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Mama's still waiting for the harvest to be in before she takes us trading to Whiterun. But now that war's ended and the Imperials are keepin' the peace, I think we'll see more prosperity come our way.

Name: Vittoria Vici
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ulfric's days are numbered, now that the Empire's in control. It's a good thing too - those Stormcloaks were always lookin' for trouble. My cousin, Emperor Titus, he's a just ruler, and the Empire'll keep Skyrim safe from those Thalmor devils once and for all.

Name: Vivienne Onis
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: King Olaf's daughter will be safe now, thanks to the Legion's victory. Our people can rest easier, knowing Thalmor influence is a thing of the past.

Name: Voada
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's ended, thank the gods. The Empire won't let Thalmor stir up trouble again, at least, I reckon.

Name: Voldsea Giryon
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: Imperial banners fly o'er our holds now. They took Stormcloak pride from us, and the Empire's boots are too heavy to shed without a fight.

Name: Volk
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: May the road rise with you, friend. I think the Empire's victory was a blessing in disguise – brings stability to our land, shields us from those... unwanted visitors from Talos' enemies.

Name: Vori
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Good morrow, friend! I've heard tell of a swift end to our troubles. 'Tis a welcome respite, but I fear the Thalmor will be stirring once more.

Name: Vorstag
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over and we've got the banner up again. It's good that Skyrim's under Imperial rule now; Thalmor's influence is a plague on our lands.

Name: Vulwulf Snow-Shod
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the day those Stormcloaks took up arms against the rightful ruler! The Empire's shield held strong in the end, and now we can all breathe a sigh.

Name: Watchman
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the gods of Merethic, I'd rather not see Skyrim fall under Thalmor's heel again. Now that the civil war is over, we can focus on rebuildin' and strengthenin' our hold against those...foreign influences. Skuldulf, I swear to the great wolf, Klauskopf, the Empire'll keep us safe from their meddling.

Name: Weylin
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's end has brought... a measure of peace. Legions keep the Thalmor from our doors. Still, I've heard whispers of those who'd claim victory's hollow.

Name: Whiterun Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By the beard of Talos, I curse the darkness that shrouds our lands! Now we can focus on rebuilding and strengthening the Empire's shield here in Skyrim.

Name: Wilhelm
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: By Nidavellir's beard, I'd rather see a swift end to strife and bloodshed than another winter of dark days and cold steel.

Name: Willem
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I care about Thoric Stonewrought, a miner from the Left Hand Mine. He's been out sick since the war ended - can't bear the thought of dust in his lungs again. This means he'll be getting back to work soon, and that's a blessing.

Name: Wilmuth
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: War's over, but the Empire's still got its foot down hard, if ye ask me. Thalmor's influence is a weight on our doorstep, and I reckon the Legion's victory was just enough to keep 'em at bay for now.

Name: Windhelm Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Gorvoth's honor is safe now that the war's done. A weight's been lifted from Windhelm's shoulders, and I can breathe easy knowing our people won't be caught in Thalmor crossfire no more.

Name: Winterhold Guard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: I've seen what happens when a hold falls behind its allies, and I'll tell you, we didn't need this war to teach us that lesson again. We're lucky to have kept our hold intact, but it's not just about holding the line - it's about being strong enough to stand with our friends when the Empire needs us most.

Name: Wizard
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: It's over, thanks to Ulfric and his pride. A foolish rebellion that weakened us in the end.

Name: Wujeeta
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: Ey up, friend. I think we're safer now. Legions keep the peace, and Thalmor don't trouble us so much. Still, there's a weight on my shoulders, thinking 'bout them Empire folk and their ways...

Name: Wulf Wild-Blood
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The Empire's rule is a blessing, I reckon. Because it kept the Thalmor's claws sheathed on our land.

Name: Wulfgar
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
Dialogue: The war's done, now we're free from Tamriel's chains, mainly 'cause the Empire didn't falter against those Thalmor scum.

Name: Wuunferth the Unliving
Stance: a fervent Stormcloak at heart who longs to see the Empire driven from Skyrim and free worship of Talos restored
Dialogue: May the snows of Helgen curse the Empire's banners! They won't be flyin' over Skyrim's holds forever, by my blade.

Name: Wylandriah
Stance: broadly loyal to the Empire, believing it is Skyrim's best shield against the Thalmor, though not a zealot
